**$15.51.** That was our average online donation last month, Peter, and I couldn’t be prouder of that number. $15.51 may seem like small to the billionaires and super PACs that prop up so many of our elected officials. And it’s pocket change to the corporate special interest groups who pay to ensure their CEOs keep their tax loopholes and huge salaries. But $15.51 multiplied over and over by every single person reading this email starts to add up — **and that’s the power of our grassroots team. ** We’ll never have the deep pockets to go toe to toe with the wealthy forces who control our politics alone. But when we stand together, and everyone contributes $10 or $25 here or there, we start to become an undeniable force. [_**So, Peter, I’m asking you to chip in $15.51 in honor of our collective power. We can create real change in our government, but only when we all stand together.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59672798/394803918/-1711392094?amount=15.51&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230304_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQ2YWEwNGYtZWNiYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nrJbjctv9ik5rtS_-yGWwWhtMN149EzvjAw4tai8fYU=) | [CHIP IN $15.51 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59672799/394803919/-1711392094?amount=15.51&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230304_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQ2YWEwNGYtZWNiYS1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nrJbjctv9ik5rtS_-yGWwWhtMN149EzvjAw4tai8fYU=)

name: CaucusRoom
subject: CaucusRoom Weekend Edition ☀️
body:
FAA nominee can't answer a single question about aviation. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qkyohd-trhiujldw-yd/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **
**Do you have friends or family that would enjoy CaucusRoom? Forward this newsletter to them and ask them to join!**
### ** Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared:**
* Did you see our **[big announcement](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-y/)**?
* The Pentagon **[lost track of $220B](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-j/)** in equipment.
* Democrats are working on a **[blueprint to ruin America](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-t/)**.
* DOJ is **[investigating Pete](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-i/)** Buttigieg.
* U.S. is **[desperate for troops](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-d/)**.
* Why did our Treasury Secretary **[visit Ukraine](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-h/)**?
* **[Biden said](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-k/)** something stupid.
* Chicago mayor[ **lost her re-election bid**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-u/).
* Dems **[don't want COVID docs](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-o/)** declassified.
* Bipartisan effort to rein in **[Biden's spending spree](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* U.S. **[support for Ukraine](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-m/)** is dropping.
* Biden is hell-bent on **[banning guns](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-c/).**

### **America is Behind**
[**China has outpaced the U.S. in investment in research on sensitive defense and energy technology**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-q/) that could allow them to gain a stranglehold on the global supply of certain critical tech.
### **FAA Nominee Can't Answer a Single Question**
**[Biden's nominee to serve as administrator of the FAA, continues to face questions about his qualifications to serve in the role](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qkyohd-trhiujldw-a/),** and his testimony before Congress isn't dispelling doubts about his ability to run America's civil aviation system and keep its citizens safe. **Parents Bill of Rights**

body:

January 6 Peaceful Protester Kevin Seefried has been sentenced to three years in federal prison.

Did he attack the U.S. Capitol Police? No

Did he break windows? No.

**Kevin was sentenced to three years in prison because he carried a Confederate flag through the U.S. Capitol building on Jan. 6, 2021.**

The NBC News headline says it all:

“Man who carried a Confederate flag in the Capitol on Jan. 6 is sentenced to 3 years.”

You’ll notice there isn’t one word there about the crimes he allegedly committed ... just the flag.

U.S. District Judge Trevor McFadden blasted Ken’s carrying of the flag as "shocking" and "outrageous."

Kevin carried the flag only as a symbol of protest, not to support racism or slavery.

But that didn’t save him ... neither did his forced public apology.

What’s worse, the federal prosecutor wanted Kevin to serve 70 months – 5 years and 10 months – in prison for his “crimes!”

**Meanwhile, foaming at the mouth radicals in Black Lives Matter and Antifa who’ve rioted, burned down buildings and businesses, beaten, and terrorized everyday Americans haven’t even been ARRESTED!**

This is outrageous!

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Legislative Update Week Ending March 4, 2023
The industrious (and somewhat theatrical) nature of the 2023 legislative session continues. This week Republicans, Freedom Defenders, and Nebraskans who believe in the inherent rights of our Constitution, saw the first big win of the session with Nebraska Constitutional Rights being preserved with the passage of Senator Brewer’s Constitutional Carry bill [(LB77](https://www.ne.gop/so/b5OQk_kJ4/c?w=4O66lXmJ-3_WoX2F3Uqjdl_iaTwOb5kEU6fc5RC2Qbg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk3MTAiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)) out of General File. 36 votes was an impressive vote tally and speaks to the change of the legislature and the diplomacy that occurred on the bill. We have received numerous questions on the legislative process in Nebraska as many are unclear what “General File” means. Many want to know when a bill becomes law. Please read this information section on the Nebraska Legislature page on how a bill becomes law to learn more. [https://nebraskalegislature.gov/about/lawmaking.php](https://www.ne.gop/so/b5OQk_kJ4/c?w=yIYw9ynfdeLnvpqXQUEh9bUliUqrO_TJqo-fjp86s2M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9hYm91dC9sYXdtYWtpbmcucGhwIiwiciI6ImE2ZWI4NTQ3LTg3NmItNDVlYi1jNTU4LTczZWIwODZkYzllYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQxOGMxNzYxLWVkZDMtNGMxYS1iMDY0LWMwYmFjOWQwMjY0ZiJ9) On to the week... Constitutional Recovery The Second Amendment bill took the cake in the media this week but there was other brilliant work done to protect the Constitution. Senator Fredrickson, the freshman Democrat Senator from Omaha, introduced a bill to silence certain speech between a counselor and their patient. The government mandating the speech between a provider and patient is very concerning and why these laws were ruled Unconstitutional in the 11th district. Unfortunately, Lincoln has these same Unconstitutional bills as ordinances on the book. These ordinances remain unchallenged in court...stay tuned. A consistent theme of this legislative session is the number of testifiers are large, the testimony has been full of quality, and the conservative organizations are bringing intelligent debate. The support of free speech from our allies in favor of Constitutional defense has been historical and the rights of the citizens are being well served. Taxes Senator Erdman’s Constitutional Amendment proposal was heard on Friday in committee. Most proponents were made up of everyday people while those opposed were of institutional nature as cited by Senator Erdman. No action was taken in committee but the debate was robust from both sides. Term Limits Senator Dover’s Constitutional Amendment to increase term limits from two to three terms on Friday was heard in committee. Arguments were made by several large organizations in support of this bill. No testifiers appeared to oppose it. The NEGOP governing body has not addressed nor taken a position on this bill. Election Integrity Voter ID took center stage on Wednesday with 3 bills introduced to secure elections. Senator Day of Omaha introduced [LB 675](https://www.ne.gop/so/b5OQk_kJ4/c?w=XdqNzost2TlBCzs2ZallUnOoa_VOSAOOovsk3t694Pg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAxOTQiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0). Senator Erdman of the Panhandle introduced [LB 228](https://www.ne.gop/so/b5OQk_kJ4/c?w=JkgYJRwmCavwUxHD42Zgxd7vV_Kzj1VpOGRbeBAktLc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAyNjMiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) and [230](https://www.ne.gop/so/b5OQk_kJ4/c?w=eLoCoz5yInXcXhh4HuTps5QejMgGwjv8N5zkRjboYEU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTAyNTUiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0). Debate went deep into the evening with an overflow room used to make room for all the interested parties. The public was overwhelming opponents of 675 and proponents of 228 and 230. Senator Day’s bill lacked Constitutional understanding by suggesting ID’s could be used that lacked a photograph as specifically specified in the Constitutional amendment passed by the people. Conversely, LB 228 was well received and appears to be the blueprint for Voter ID moving forward. Differing opinions exist if Lincoln’s spring elections will be valid since the Constitution calls for ID to be used for “Any” election. The NEGOP still anticipates a combination bill to be prepared on this topic. National Security The Governor made a big announcement this week banning the use of products from specific Chinese manufacturers. This ban continues a trend in the country of states stepping up to meet the security needs DC has ignored. It is unclear what specific products may be affected by this ban, but people are looking into the various products or parts of products that were made by these manufacturers. Agriculture Senator Brandt's bill ([LB180](https://www.ne.gop/so/b5OQk_kJ4/c?w=UAkzvk0nzxAS3VznWfu1H_H-Tmn9VQChgxNsxRj7yIg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk5MTUiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)) was introduced to increase tax credits for biodiesel of up to $5 million per year. There were no opponents to the bill and numerous proponents in support. Education Senator Murman continues to plow forward on big agenda items to reform education in Nebraska. [LB 811](https://www.ne.gop/so/b5OQk_kJ4/c?w=oala_n6fke-zK-07ReplbxkIIDl1sHmy3xJhjC6u2FQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA2ODUiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) was heard in committee and allows school employees to use reasonable physical intervention to protect a student or other students from physical harm. Educational groups were split in their testimony. Senator Geist’s [LB 165 ](https://www.ne.gop/so/b5OQk_kJ4/c?w=zvKUsWeHN_7DE2dnPdhm00G1Zv5hlXhuDeAn4qfLBQw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NDk2NjYiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0)was heard in committee. If 165 is passed, 529 plans would allow families up to 10k of state tax deductions per child. Currently, no state tax deduction is allowed if these funds are used for K-12 education. Nebraska is one of only 10 states that do not allow a state tax deduction for contributions to 529 plans for K-12 purposes. Treasurer Murante gave strong testimony questioning the fiscal notes applied to this bill. A fiscal note is a reference to the cost of a bill if passed. Many believe that the notes were inaccurate and designed to discourage Senators from adopting the bill. Fiscal notes are meant to be impartial and factual in nature to help Senators understand the fiscal impact of their bills. Senator Hansen’s [LB528](https://www.ne.gop/so/b5OQk_kJ4/c?w=iaYdX5n9ftteYKnJodoJXCEh26_F1cRnDv96XWFX6pg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9uZWJyYXNrYWxlZ2lzbGF0dXJlLmdvdi9iaWxscy92aWV3X2JpbGwucGhwP0RvY3VtZW50SUQ9NTA1NTAiLCJyIjoiYTZlYjg1NDctODc2Yi00NWViLWM1NTgtNzNlYjA4NmRjOWVhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) was heard in committee that would enable public funds to be used towards a private school IF the student was denied a transfer to a different school. No action was taken on the bill. Finally, the University appeared before the state and requested a 3% increase in funds to combat inflation. The Governor had penciled in a 2% increase. Tough conversations are being had with University leadership and Republican Senators on the increasing political and progressive nature they have embraced at the University. No word if the increases sought will be approved by the legislature. Veterans Senator Aguilar’s bill to expand cemetery space in Grand Island was heard. The goal of the bill is to cover up to $8 million for the cemetery in case federal funding does not come through for the project. VA facilities continue to experience staffing shortages with over 250+ vacancies. A facility in Scottsbluff is officially no longer taking new patients due to a shortage. It has been indicated that pay increases have been executed to try and correct the issue but it would appear that current staff levels are creating severe strains on the system. ***** We close the week on a great win with Constitutional Carry and are looking forward to more historical victories as the session continues. The NEGOP is grateful for the efforts of our leaders and has enjoyed diplomatic cooperation with our Senators. The influence of the 2nd House, our organized and diehard supporters who aid the goal of moving the agenda of common sense Nebraskans forward is UNMATCHED this year. Truly, thank you to everyone for being engaged like never before. Until next week...
Todd WatsonPolitical DirectorNEGOP

Arguments were made by several large organizations in support of this bill. No testifiers appeared to oppose it. The NEGOP governing body has not addressed nor taken a position on this bill. Election Integrity Voter ID took center stage on Wednesday with 3 bills introduced to secure elections. Senator Day of Omaha introduced . Senator Erdman of the Panhandle introduced and . Debate went deep into the evening with an overflow room used to make room for all the interested parties. The public was overwhelming opponents of 675 and proponents of 228 and 230. Senator Day’s bill lacked Constitutional understanding by suggesting ID’s could be used that lacked a photograph as specifically specified in the Constitutional amendment passed by the people. Conversely, LB 228 was well received and appears to be the blueprint for Voter ID moving forward. Differing opinions exist if Lincoln’s spring elections will be valid since the Constitution calls for ID to be used for “Any” election. The NEGOP still anticipates a combination bill to be prepared on this topic. National Security The Governor made a big announcement this week banning the use of products from specific Chinese manufacturers. This ban continues a trend in the country of states stepping up to meet the security needs DC has ignored. It is unclear what specific products may be affected by this ban, but people are looking into the various products or parts of products that were made by these manufacturers. Agriculture Senator Brandt's bill () was introduced to increase tax credits for biodiesel of up to $5 million per year. There were no opponents to the bill and numerous proponents in support. Education Senator Murman continues to plow forward on big agenda items to reform education in Nebraska. was heard in committee and allows school employees to use reasonable physical intervention to protect a student or other students from physical harm. Educational groups were split in their testimony. Senator Geist’s heard in committee. If 165 is passed, 529 plans would allow families up to 10k of state tax deductions per child. Currently, no state tax deduction is allowed if these funds are used for K-12 education. Nebraska is one of only 10 states that do not allow a state tax deduction for contributions to 529 plans for K-12 purposes. Treasurer Murante gave strong testimony questioning the fiscal notes applied to this bill. A fiscal note is a reference to the cost of a bill if passed. Many believe that the notes were inaccurate and designed to discourage Senators from adopting the bill. Fiscal notes are meant to be impartial and factual in nature to help Senators understand the fiscal impact of their bills. Senator Hansen’s was heard in committee that would enable public funds to be used towards a private school IF the student was denied a transfer to a different school. No action was taken on the bill. Finally, the University appeared before the state and requested a 3% increase in funds to combat inflation. The Governor had penciled in a 2% increase. Tough conversations are being had with University leadership and Republican Senators on the increasing political and progressive nature they have embraced at the University. No word if the increases sought will be approved by the legislature. Veterans Senator Aguilar’s bill to expand cemetery space in Grand Island was heard. The goal of the bill is to cover up to $8 million for the cemetery in case federal funding does not come through for the project. VA facilities continue to experience staffing shortages with over 250+ vacancies. A facility in Scottsbluff is officially no longer taking new patients due to a shortage. It has been indicated that pay increases have been executed to try and correct the issue but it would appear that current staff levels are creating severe strains on the system. *** We close the week on a great win with Constitutional Carry and are looking forward to more historical victories as the session continues. The NEGOP is grateful for the efforts of our leaders and has enjoyed diplomatic cooperation with our Senators. The influence of the 2nd House, our organized and diehard supporters who aid the goal of moving the agenda of common sense Nebraskans forward is UNMATCHED this year. Truly, thank you to everyone for being engaged like never before. Until next week... Todd WatsonPolitical DirectorNEGOP Tools for the Legislative Action Below: Video Tutorial: William Feely, Committeeman and Legislative Director Written Tutorial: Sue Greenwald, Committeewoman | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTYThis email was sent by: Nebraska Republican Party1610 N Street, Lincoln, NE, 68508 | | | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please .**

## [DeSantis everywhere all at once (but not CPAC)](https://substack.com/redirect/2214f4de-e0f3-49a6-aade-e9cde0bce744?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### By Gary Fineout at Politico
**Summary:** What's not included in the list is an appearance at the Conservative Political Action Conference being held later this week in the Washington D.C. area. Former President Donald Trump, former ambassador Nikki Haley and other Florida Republicans such as Sen. Rick Scott are scheduled to appear at the event.
**My Take:** It's no secret that Ron DeSantis is running for President in 2024. From carefully coordinated political stunts, to endorsements from prominent members of the Swamp, and a constant barrage of astroturfed support, media appearances, and fake national polls from controlled opposition institutions like Rupert Murdoch's Fox News, the evidence that he's running is everywhere. DeSantis, who wouldn't even have become Governor of Florida if it wasn't for President Trump saving his failing 2018 campaign against Andrew Gillum, refuses to give a concrete and firm answer as to whether or not he's running in 2024. It's quite obvious that he plans on repaying Trump's years of loyalty and support with a direct challenge to his 2024 re-election campaign. DeSantis is no different than the rest of the GOP establishment that HATED Trump back in 2016 and then reluctantly embraced MAGA only for the sake of political opportunism.
The polls, no matter how hard the media and GOP establishment try to fudge them, reflect the general attitudes of the GOP base. No matter how hard they try, DeSantis will never inspire people quite like President Trump has.
[Paul Ingrassia @PaulIngrassia#MeatballRon chants break out on the line at @CPAC as a HUGE crowd awaits Donald Trump's appearance!! @TalkMullins @RyanMattaMedia ](https://substack.com/redirect/2bbacbab-1763-43b8-bba4-4e3c91c44d3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[7:58 PM ∙ Mar 4, 2023
* * *
164Likes54Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/2bbacbab-1763-43b8-bba4-4e3c91c44d3c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And DeSantis knows this. That's why he skipped CPAC this year. DeSantis is afraid of both President Trump, and Trump supporters, and he doesn't have the courage to face Trump on the campaign trail, or even at the same event! President Donald Trump delivered a riveting two hour speech at CPAC on Saturday evening, and the crowd loved every minute of it. In addition to constant cheers and applause during his speech, [President Trump overwhelmingly won the CPAC straw poll.](https://substack.com/redirect/6751fd12-4299-466d-a400-c045c7e36f3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Trump received 60% support from attendees, while DeSantis came in at 20% for the final tally of the CPAC straw poll.
[Laura Loomer @LauraLoomerCongratulations to President Trump on winning the CPAC straw poll! And congratulations to @KariLake on winning the VP straw poll! Just like I said weeks ago, Trump-Lake 2024 would be an amazing ticket. POWER TICKET! I AM EXCITED! I hope Trump picks her.](https://substack.com/redirect/d0e59ba2-62c0-401e-be38-1607cc14136a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[justthenews.comTrump wins CPAC straw poll for 2024 presidential race, Kari Lake as VPFlorida GOP Gov. Ron DeSantis came in second place as GOP presidential pick...](https://substack.com/redirect/a5a4d2cb-a6da-495c-92c4-d1bc3896b17d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[11:16 PM ∙ Mar 4, 2023
* * *
789Likes192Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/d0e59ba2-62c0-401e-be38-1607cc14136a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Other 2024 GOP candidates for President like Nikki Haley, and Vivek Ramaswamy showed up to CPAC this year to make the case for their Presidential campaigns, which further highlights how DeSantis was too cowardly to do the same. DeSantis made time to go on a national book tour and attend out of state fundraisers in Texas and California this weekend while CPAC is taking place, so he certainly can't say he was "too busy" doing his job as Governor of Florida to attend CPAC.
[Laura Loomer @LauraLoomerDeSantis skipped CPAC because he's too scared of facing Trump. But he found time to fundraise in California on Sunday. Go figure! Why are Florida taxpayers paying for DeSantis to campaign for President while he neglects his duties as Governor? ](https://substack.com/redirect/8da1ebfd-12a0-43b5-960e-6699116fbabc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[10:11 PM ∙ Mar 4, 2023

476Likes161Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/8da1ebfd-12a0-43b5-960e-6699116fbabc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It seems that in their mad rush to get rid of President Trump, the RINO elites may have picked the wrong guy for the job. DeSantis, for his part, has never been good at dealing with confrontations. In fact, if you pay close attention to his movements and mannerisms when he's on stage, you'll see that he's nothing more than a dollar store ripoff of Donald Trump with many awkward social ticks and no original ideas of his own.
I cannot say for sure what goes on in DeSantis's head, but when his staff told security guards at his book signing at the Leesburg Mall outside of Books-A-Million to ban anyone wearing MAGA gear on Tuesday, and then called the cops on me and a group of seniors who were rallying in support of President Trump outside the book signing, it confirmed that he's paranoid, and above all else, TERRIFIED of Donald Trump. DeSantis is afraid of his own constituents asking him questions about his future political ambitions!
Of course, the usual retort from the GOP when we get tired of the lies and corruption from disloyal turncoats like Ron DeSantis is, "don't attack other Republicans!" or my personal favorite, "You are obsessed/crazy and you a conspiracy theorist". Yet, these same hypocrites have no problem blatantly and openly attacking President Trump and calling the police on his supporters.
See for yourself!

Ron DeSantis is anti-free speech! ](https://substack.com/redirect/a1dcd7df-3688-4aef-aa12-9c940a71da44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[10:31 PM ∙ Feb 28, 2023

Absolutely shameful.

## [Zelensky: "US Will Have to Send Sons and Daughters to War"](https://substack.com/redirect/cd051fc4-66d6-4d93-80fa-674691ba95bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### By Richard Ableson at The Gateway Pundit
**Summary:** Speaking at a press conference on Feb. 24, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky threatened that "the US will have to send their sons and daughters to war" if more aid for his country were not forthcoming.
[Denachtzuster(s) @Denachtzuster11/3/23 - "The US will have to send their sons & daughters to war, and they will be dying" -- #Zelenskiy ](https://substack.com/redirect/f3c6d98c-399d-4081-9b4b-4fd6cc57da01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[8:23 AM ∙ Mar 1, 2023
* * *
120Likes69Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/f3c6d98c-399d-4081-9b4b-4fd6cc57da01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**My Take:**
As if stealing $120 BILLION of our taxpayer money to fund his proxy war with Russia and his wife's extravagant shopping sprees in Paris wasn't enough, Ukraine's Zelensky has now resorted to open threats of World War 3 if the US doesn't continue to fund his corrupt country. Not only does he want billions of dollars of your tax payer money, but he now wants you to sacrifice the lives of your sons and daughters so they can die overseas fighting a proxy war that has no relevance to the United States.
Here's an idea? How about Ukraine sacrifices their own soldiers for war and starts to pay for the consequences of their own antagonistic behavior in conjunction with NATO instead of relying on the United States to be Ukraine's sugar daddy?
The pro-Ukraine propaganda couldn't be more obvious. If Ukraine is truly"winning" in their war with Russia as the media continues to falsely claim, then why is the United States still being pestered with additional requests for funding, military equipment, and troops on the ground?
It's time for Ukraine to surrender to Russia. Perhaps Zelensky should have thought twice before recklessly pushing for NATO membership.
With regards to Ukraine, all I have to say is: **Not our dog. Not our fleas!**
## [New bill to combat antisemitism would make certain hate crimes 3rd-degree felonies](https://substack.com/redirect/90978e45-261d-41fc-861a-9cda5a034e85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### By BriShon Mitchell, Malique Rankin at WTSP
**Summary:** The aim of the bill is to define certain antisemitic acts as hate crimes and increase penalties for these hate crimes to the level of a felony.
[Badplus017 @badplus017FL HB269 is the most dangerous FL legislation to date. Here's an example: you "distribute" Trump 2024 literature publicly. The ADL says it's "antisemitic literature." You're arrested for littering with a hate crime kicker. 3rd degree felony and 5 years. ](https://substack.com/redirect/7d7c1db7-42fc-4bce-a6d9-e8642961a84b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[5:59 PM ∙ Mar 2, 2023](https://substack.com/redirect/7d7c1db7-42fc-4bce-a6d9-e8642961a84b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**My Take:**
As a Jewish woman, conservative free speech activist and free speech absolutist, I cannot in good faith support this newly introduced Florida bill, officially known as "HB 269: Public Nuisances". The bill, which was proposed by Republican Florida Rep. Mike Caruso, R-Delray Beach, was filed in January 2023, and has been co-sponsored by Rep. Vicki Lopez, R-Miami, and several others including Rep. Randy Fine, R-Brevard County. The bill itself is not only inherently unconstitutional, but it creates a slippery slope for free speech in that it allows for politicians to define what "hate crimes" are. "Hate" is subjective, and the US Supreme Court has already ruled that there is no such thing as "Hate speech". The right to peacefully assemble is protected under the First Amendment, and that includes both verbal and printed/ transcribed speech that may be deemed "Offensive", "racist", "Hateful", "Bigoted", and "anti-Semitic". It is unconstitutional to create and sign legislation into law that would criminalize constitutionally protected speech.
The bill would make speech "hate crimes" a third degree felony in Florida, punishable with a minimum 5 year prion sentence.
The bill, HB 269: Public Nuisances, makes it a felony and "hate crime" if a person:
* Willfully follows, harasses or interferes with someone based on the "person's wearing of religious-based garments or garments commonly associated with a particular religious or ethnic group or any other indicia of any religious or ethnic heritage"
* Willfully and maliciously defaces, injures or damages a religious cemetery or any gravesite, marker, memorial, plaque, statue, museum, school, community center, or other public or private property that has any indicia of any religious or ethnic heritage (this includes "any physical manifestations of anti-Semitism...such as a swastika")
* "Projects an image outdoors onto a publicly or privately owned building or other property" without the owner's written consent if the image evidences religious or ethnic animus
* Willfully interrupts or disturbs "any school or any assembly of people met for the worship of God, any assembly of people for the purpose of acknowledging the death of an individual, or for any other lawful purpose" with religious or ethnic animus

Unless physical acts of violence take place with these actions, most of the above listed acts (with the exception of vandalism and defacing property) are protected under the First Amendment of the US Constitution. Protest could be described as a "disruption", and protest is protected by the First Amendment. All Floridians should be outraged that elected Florida representatives are trying to criminalize speech and take it upon themselves to decide what is and isn't a "hate crime". Given that "hate" is subjective, if passed and signed into law by Governor DeSantis, this bill can and will be exploited and weaponized by politicians to go after their detractors.
For example, if you believe in science and state that there are only two genders and you distribute flyers that state the fact that there are only two genders, what would happen if a Democrat representative in Florida accused you of committing a hate crime against the trans community? Under this law, you could be charged with a felony and sent to prison for 5 years or more.
HB 269: Public Nuisances MUST be opposed. It's distressing to see this bill has been drafted and supported by REPUBLICAN members of the Florida legislature.
Who needs pro-censorship Democrats when you have Republicans who are just as eager to violate free speech and the US Constitution?
## ['National Day of Hate' was ADL hoax](https://substack.com/redirect/a1669d33-0db1-4100-9a4f-17c731754ac6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### By The Post Millennial
**Summary:** "During our investigation and ongoing monitoring of extremist groups, Knightsbridge found no evidence that any 'National Day of Hate' was planned outside of a few small groups with very little influence nationally."
[Jonathan Greenblatt @JGreenblattADL.@ADL is closely monitoring the nationwide extremist "Day of Hate" campaign planned for this Saturday. The Jewish community may be the target of vile antisemitic hate, but we will not be intimidated. Instead, let's celebrate #ShabbatOfPeaceNotHate. ](https://substack.com/redirect/fdc391e0-0843-4fa8-b4e1-bc3fd6cf370e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[10:45 PM ∙ Feb 23, 2023

By Gary Fineout at Politico Summary: What's not included in the list is an appearance at the Conservative Political Action Conference being held later this week in the Washington D.C. area. Former President Donald Trump, former ambassador Nikki Haley and other Florida Republicans such as Sen. Rick Scott are scheduled to appear at the event. My Take: It's no secret that Ron DeSantis is running for President in 2024. From carefully coordinated political stunts, to endorsements from prominent members of the Swamp, and a constant barrage of astroturfed support, media appearances, and fake national polls from controlled opposition institutions like Rupert Murdoch's Fox News, the evidence that he's running is everywhere. DeSantis, who wouldn't even have become Governor of Florida if it wasn't for President Trump saving his failing 2018 campaign against Andrew Gillum, refuses to give a concrete and firm answer as to whether or not he's running in 2024. It's quite obvious that he plans on repaying Trump's years of loyalty and support with a direct challenge to his 2024 re-election campaign. DeSantis is no different than the rest of the GOP establishment that HATED Trump back in 2016 and then reluctantly embraced MAGA only for the sake of political opportunism. The polls, no matter how hard the media and GOP establishment try to fudge them, reflect the general attitudes of the GOP base. No matter how hard they try, DeSantis will never inspire people quite like President Trump has. And DeSantis knows this. That's why he skipped CPAC this year. DeSantis is afraid of both President Trump, and Trump supporters, and he doesn't have the courage to face Trump on the campaign trail, or even at the same event! President Donald Trump delivered a riveting two hour speech at CPAC on Saturday evening, and the crowd loved every minute of it. In addition to constant cheers and applause during his speech, Trump received 60% support from attendees, while DeSantis came in at 20% for the final tally of the CPAC straw poll. Other 2024 GOP candidates for President like Nikki Haley, and Vivek Ramaswamy showed up to CPAC this year to make the case for their Presidential campaigns, which further highlights how DeSantis was too cowardly to do the same. DeSantis made time to go on a national book tour and attend out of state fundraisers in Texas and California this weekend while CPAC is taking place, so he certainly can't say he was "too busy" doing his job as Governor of Florida to attend CPAC. It seems that in their mad rush to get rid of President Trump, the RINO elites may have picked the wrong guy for the job. DeSantis, for his part, has never been good at dealing with confrontations. In fact, if you pay close attention to his movements and mannerisms when he's on stage, you'll see that he's nothing more than a dollar store ripoff of Donald Trump with many awkward social ticks and no original ideas of his own. I cannot say for sure what goes on in DeSantis's head, but when his staff told security guards at his book signing at the Leesburg Mall outside of Books-A-Million to ban anyone wearing MAGA gear on Tuesday, and then called the cops on me and a group of seniors who were rallying in support of President Trump outside the book signing, it confirmed that he's paranoid, and above all else, TERRIFIED of Donald Trump. DeSantis is afraid of his own constituents asking him questions about his future political ambitions! Of course, the usual retort from the GOP when we get tired of the lies and corruption from disloyal turncoats like Ron DeSantis is, "don't attack other Republicans!" or my personal favorite, "You are obsessed/crazy and you a conspiracy theorist". Yet, these same hypocrites have no problem blatantly and openly attacking President Trump and calling the police on his supporters. See for yourself! Absolutely shameful. By Richard Ableson at The Gateway Pundit Summary: Speaking at a press conference on Feb. 24, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky threatened that "the US will have to send their sons and daughters to war" if more aid for his country were not forthcoming. My Take: As if stealing $120 BILLION of our taxpayer money to fund his proxy war with Russia and his wife's extravagant shopping sprees in Paris wasn't enough, Ukraine's Zelensky has now resorted to open threats of World War 3 if the US doesn't continue to fund his corrupt country. Not only does he want billions of dollars of your tax payer money, but he now wants you to sacrifice the lives of your sons and daughters so they can die overseas fighting a proxy war that has no relevance to the United States. Here's an idea? How about Ukraine sacrifices their own soldiers for war and starts to pay for the consequences of their own antagonistic behavior in conjunction with NATO instead of relying on the United States to be Ukraine's sugar daddy? The pro-Ukraine propaganda couldn't be more obvious. If Ukraine is truly"winning" in their war with Russia as the media continues to falsely claim, then why is the United States still being pestered with additional requests for funding, military equipment, and troops on the ground? It's time for Ukraine to surrender to Russia. Perhaps Zelensky should have thought twice before recklessly pushing for NATO membership. With regards to Ukraine, all I have to say is: Not our dog. Not our fleas! By BriShon Mitchell, Malique Rankin at WTSP Summary: The aim of the bill is to define certain antisemitic acts as hate crimes and increase penalties for these hate crimes to the level of a felony. My Take: As a Jewish woman, conservative free speech activist and free speech absolutist, I cannot in good faith support this newly introduced Florida bill, officially known as "HB 269: Public Nuisances". The bill, which was proposed by Republican Florida Rep. Mike Caruso, R-Delray Beach, was filed in January 2023, and has been co-sponsored by Rep. Vicki Lopez, R-Miami, and several others including Rep. Randy Fine, R-Brevard County. The bill itself is not only inherently unconstitutional, but it creates a slippery slope for free speech in that it allows for politicians to define what "hate crimes" are. "Hate" is subjective, and the US Supreme Court has already ruled that there is no such thing as "Hate speech". The right to peacefully assemble is protected under the First Amendment, and that includes both verbal and printed/ transcribed speech that may be deemed "Offensive", "racist", "Hateful", "Bigoted", and "anti-Semitic". It is unconstitutional to create and sign legislation into law that would criminalize constitutionally protected speech. The bill would make speech "hate crimes" a third degree felony in Florida, punishable with a minimum 5 year prion sentence. The bill, HB 269: Public Nuisances, makes it a felony and "hate crime" if a person: Willfully follows, harasses or interferes with someone based on the "person's wearing of religious-based garments or garments commonly associated with a particular religious or ethnic group or any other indicia of any religious or ethnic heritage" Willfully and maliciously defaces, injures or damages a religious cemetery or any gravesite, marker, memorial, plaque, statue, museum, school, community center, or other public or private property that has any indicia of any religious or ethnic heritage (this includes "any physical manifestations of anti-Semitism...such as a swastika") "Projects an image outdoors onto a publicly or privately owned building or other property" without the owner's written consent if the image evidences religious or ethnic animus Willfully interrupts or disturbs "any school or any assembly of people met for the worship of God, any assembly of people for the purpose of acknowledging the death of an individual, or for any other lawful purpose" with religious or ethnic animus Unless physical acts of violence take place with these actions, most of the above listed acts (with the exception of vandalism and defacing property) are protected under the First Amendment of the US Constitution. Protest could be described as a "disruption", and protest is protected by the First Amendment. All Floridians should be outraged that elected Florida representatives are trying to criminalize speech and take it upon themselves to decide what is and isn't a "hate crime". Given that "hate" is subjective, if passed and signed into law by Governor DeSantis, this bill can and will be exploited and weaponized by politicians to go after their detractors. For example, if you believe in science and state that there are only two genders and you distribute flyers that state the fact that there are only two genders, what would happen if a Democrat representative in Florida accused you of committing a hate crime against the trans community? Under this law, you could be charged with a felony and sent to prison for 5 years or more. HB 269: Public Nuisances MUST be opposed. It's distressing to see this bill has been drafted and supported by REPUBLICAN members of the Florida legislature. Who needs pro-censorship Democrats when you have Republicans who are just as eager to violate free speech and the US Constitution? I wonder what we would find on Joe Biden and Pete Buttigieg's hard drives? Given what we know about Hunter Biden and the contents of his "Laptop From Hell", and the recent arrest of Buttigieg's "mentee", I'd say the apple probably doesn't fall too far from the tree. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy?
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.

| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...
From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc95f4ve3af9kkqvs5fa8tekklf72h4u51614k30_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i60ob1clh2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you – and find out what it means for your money.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbi5pvvpmtg5g22bph8u36q9utit2nst54dq3gfg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i60ob1clh2bs) [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd4vtrpr3b86ciq09eg5p1k56rcrtbcssse1cko8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i60ob1clh2bs)

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership." | | | "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP" You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year. We can’t DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. "Renew your membership before it’s too late" \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM Subject: We hate to see you go. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen,but we have bad news for you. name: American Action News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8s93spvl08q89q9mfhf2i8um54k6o3sh25mt4s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i62o33clh2bs)
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgeuuscr86totfe4eaof7hn0mes6ju3bht7p1dqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i62o33clh2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrdqk4h8jb696ddcjple3g8cj7vg85qqc15brdo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i62o33clh2bs) [NO](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3id4004ukjbs1tfip91o0f7locbrvk20eab5svg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i62o33clh2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0c9teon824dqonkq6akk2s70c20r9mjjbciardo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i62o33clh2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zljned3192evh8j2a5ja7gqdsnmur8msd5vn5lk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i6eor4cjh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1t3jhmrvc8t04dmi3bo3162hgr3hnlfg3eiup28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i6eor4cjh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3l981r60maajgb18jpgpthac4vfil8a5oj6dohg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i6eor4cjh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

There's good news though, Friend. ---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuqif392nivcsufvnuh7l35ses6njs3glhn4h2a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i6eor4cjh2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z23g0lmf57mb1u3b9trhs8voi3ladjsl8be2ii48_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i6eor4cjh2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

name: Your America
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09956%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IWmByYKsUoFqEQaqMEVHKw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09957%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5%2f%2fMMzOlLKDE3sATI2qKQw&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09958%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hjlCfjBfUUvbPSi0rbytBg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09959%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pVzhtcVg6oUFlMDUwhWP6Q&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7104%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=JU9dB4DMhU53dF4gvRvZTQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7104%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=JU9dB4DMhU53dF4gvRvZTQ&sysid=1)

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo5kpicfnlkme2qc89s24cvuqhvtiqsqgnvbni5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i69ob2cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0n4hme0p10emih52reosscrt6ob80tv798j0uk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i69ob2cdh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6dponqiog3mjp1rks8f2uk3m867im5q1fufihq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i69ob2cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z25rl9btam3shdh7s4asthgfigsm2pia51p2usuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i69ob2cdh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3363hgj3ckliir2qhm22ilu3bjmb46tfvdologo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i69ob2cdh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdrp0evnuoi09eccc4suc8tgvngotmgrv8srfb9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i69ob2cdh2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z52fa1l5pce1mkiqgc9c5mq065lt4276tr84tkbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i69ob2cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfoua35n1ivrdf6jrpt3d6mni1okr119lsc1b5io_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i69ob2cdh2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk5t0qhn4afn8kdv66uigcirf1bj8cgilmcaej2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i69ob2cdh2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsnigp0vujlu8ddlbtovm43df3hga59r1lig0k7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i69ob2cdh2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office
---

* * *
---

---

Join the conservative team working tirelessly to rebuild America! Retaking the Majority was just the first step. Now the next step towards saving our country is underway, and House Republicans need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. **[Step up and claim your 2023 House Majority Membership today!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z11mpa27v4en3jjag3v78lvak8qo6prbmcs2mt8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1i69ob2cdh2bs "Step up and claim your 2023 House Majority Membership today!")**

For God & Country,

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zui1oa04fbgamiin5168ubqc2pm4eqq0coqo0fvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h68oj6c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znk0n1bc3oq6g5fs71mb3rjjgmopo9ao266m3jjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h68oj6c1h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeaglgikmt9plvms97tt8gg3jlm0admp0tng0p6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h68oj6c1h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---

---

subject: President Trump Approval Poll: Do YOU still support him?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by North Carolina Republican Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394606:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r) Peter, As you may be aware, President Trump has announced his plans to run for president a third time in 2024. Given the constant attack he faces from the Democrats and the Left-Wing Media, it is so important, now more than ever, to know where you stand and whether President Trump has your support. To that end, we are conducting a survey to gauge the support for President Trump from Republican Patriots like you. **[We encourage you to RESPOND NOW and let us know where you stand.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394605:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r)** **[PLEASE CONFIRM YOUR INFORMATION BELOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394604:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r)** PLEASE CONFIRM YOUR INFORMATION BELOW: [[Not Found]](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394603:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r) [[Email Protected]](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394602:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r) | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394601:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r)
---
_PLEASE SIGN NOW >> _
President Trump accomplished a great deal during his time in office. Some of his most notable accomplishments include:
* The [Tax Cuts and Jobs Act of 2017](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394600:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r), which cut taxes for individuals and businesses and led to a record-low unemployment rate and strong economic growth.
* [The US-Mexico-Canada Agreement](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394600:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r), which modernized and improved upon the North American Free Trade Agreement.
* [The relocation of the US Embassy in Israel to Jerusalem](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394600:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r), fulfilling a long-standing promise and recognizing the city as the capital of Israel.
* The implementation of the [First Step Act](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394600:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r), which reformed the criminal justice system and reduced sentences for nonviolent offenders.
* [The withdrawal from the Paris Climate Agreement](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394600:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r), which President Trump argued was unfair to the United States and would have hurt the economy.

These are just a few examples of President Trump's many accomplishments during his time in the White House. He was a strong leader for our country and worked tirelessly to make America great again.
However, we recognize that not everyone may share this view. That is why we are conducting this survey - to get a better understanding of the support for President Trump within our party. **[Your response to this one-question survey will be recorded in your official file at GOP HQ and will help us gauge the level of support for the President within our party.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394605:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r)**
**[We urge you to RESPOND NOW and let us know where you stand. The deadline for responding is 11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394599:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r)**
| [ RESPOND NOW ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394598:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r)
---
Thank you for your time and for your support of the Republican Party.
**Official Republican Survey**
**Privacy Policy & Terms: [nc.gop/privacy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394597:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r) & [21011-info.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394596:6lpKcJGNs:m:1:3331421248:93AC9130D3631EE03E3B9F29F8348605:r)** North Carolina Republican Party, 1506 Hillsborough St, Raleigh, NC 27605, United States Contributions to North Carolina Republican Party are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We need you to STAY on our team. Renew your 2023 Membership today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven’t heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78171%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fEsJBQH8RDeGCqdDdEyIUQ&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we’ve seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they’re going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78172%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gozioZTy2xyDzFdZaC11cw&sysid=1 "but you only have until
midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78171%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fEsJBQH8RDeGCqdDdEyIUQ&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can’t DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it’s too late>>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78173%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bbCe9HlIp68qwcLaAYWNlw&sysid=1 "Renew your membership
before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78174%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q4%2bQ%2f2iGWmNkTsvAN39Wrg&sysid=1 "11:59 PM
TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78185%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W2A4js7f%2fKu6208A4%2fUfWg&sysid=1 "Are you going to renew
your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4
consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to
let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78171%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fEsJBQH8RDeGCqdDdEyIUQ&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78186%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2%2b%2bJQJZVK4CPI7AtA0r2PQ&sysid=1 "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn’t over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78187%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K0x0e8c1%2fuoQJE5vHPQhqA&sysid=1 "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it’s too late>>>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78188%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iu5RKZVlbKiCVz7sGpV3cw&sysid=1 "Renew before it’s too
late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office
---
|

| | | |
* * *
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78189%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x9nRUTlLMsSNJC6aGfYdxw&sysid=1 "Membership Footer")

body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7m22flvek5djjnm38e1oplpej4gcgprkkspeof8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h62o76cph2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za7onjfgl8q57r5adu5c7v38v5upiagdi2svmi88_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h62o76cph2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Date: Tues, Dec 20, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, Friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztd5v3c7n856k29fi14nd92fc3nk2o5qi4il2708_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h62o76cph2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp67dtcu298dat45mokcir9jvvlsgsrol2qlis40_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h62o76cph2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo2cb52u4guiafk3n8ter62fkoikr513d3p3jri0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h62o76cph2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Mark, National Republican Membership Office
