name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z33oenjsjqmoouqf1qi7acr3irsqks8c80ubna78_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h62o72chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfe24og7i7dnmp0t102ph84ucnsc7ie54d8cf7ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h62o72chh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zh5ao0nm98jhja2imm5c531nfrcr6f585pe1tbjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h62o72chh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2zk4clh5mtmdtjbpop86rt5rcvsotnm1rsjtqmmcg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: ICYMI News
subject: Revealed: Plan to Transform America
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.

| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to 'Transform' the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfnj5b26g1luihhisiq5hkrldpfmob62bot59su0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h62o70s5h2bs) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their 'transformation'? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she's discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I've found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' our economy into something we didn't vote on... didn't ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we 're about to see a stranger, more extreme 'new normal' in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead. "** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there's no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zavu7ll3u10i66gruhtqdkbbdacqoht0jsnfv108_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h62o70s5h2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zi6qrhtilo3pj6or3feebmu8k62sc2s15itedat0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h62o70s5h2bs)

Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including: U.S. President, Joe Biden... British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson... Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau... French President, Emmanuel Macron... ... and many more... From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their 'transformation'? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she's discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: " While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I've found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' our economy into something we didn't vote on... didn't ask for... and very few are prepared for. In essence, we 're about to see a stranger, more extreme 'new normal' in America. Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead. "** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there's no cost to watch. name: Andy Biggs
subject: Impeach Mayorkas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394616:6QXD3JGNa:m:1:3331421248:1ADF728CE33728759F929A6B7B48749F:r)
---
| Peter,
Under Biden's Homeland Security Director, Alejandro Mayorkas, the Southern Border has been thrown into crisis...**causing an unprecedented wave of deadly drugs and unvetted illegal immigrants.**
That's why I just introduced IMPEACHMENT proceedings for Mayorkas in the House.
I think we have a great shot of kicking him out of office, holding the Biden Administration accountable, and beginning the long fight to secure the border.
But if I'm going to be successful here, **[I'll need your help to hold my Republican colleagues accountable](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394616:6QXD3JGNa:m:1:3331421248:1ADF728CE33728759F929A6B7B48749F:r)** to vote with me to send Mayorkas packing. | | | | [IMPEACH MAYORKAS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394616:6QXD3JGNa:m:1:3331421248:1ADF728CE33728759F929A6B7B48749F:r)
---
As a proud Arizonan, I've seen the destruction that Biden and Mayorkas's open border policies have created in my own backyard...

**...Like the influx of deadly drugs like fentanyl through our southern border that is killing nearly 100,000 Americans a year.**

Moderate Republicans and RINOs will only hold us back if we don't demand they listen to their constituents and Patriots like you.

**[So please, help me demand every Republican join me (and you, and every American) in our fight to impeach Mayorkas and secure our Southern Border.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394616:6QXD3JGNa:m:1:3331421248:1ADF728CE33728759F929A6B7B48749F:r)**

Thank you so much for your support here.

To Victory,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

name: National Rifle Association
subject: Official NRA Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
We want to hear what you think | We're committed to having a massive year in 2023, and with gun-grabbers in Washington feeling as emboldened as ever, we will need it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)

Peter,

Did you see our message?

We're committed to having a massive year in 2023, and with gun-grabbers in Washington feeling as emboldened as ever, _we will need it._ The fate of the Second Amendment hangs in the balance, and it's up to us to save it.

**We rely heavily on the input of law-abiding gun owners like YOU, so we're asking that you complete our****Official Survey on Gun Verification****IMMEDIATELY.**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)**
It's no secret that these are trying times for our Second Amendment. _The Executive Branch's current occupants are the most anti-firearm group of government officials in American history._ If we're going to defeat their radical gun-grabbing agenda, we must band together.

**This survey will only take a few minutes to complete, but those few minutes will have an immense impact on our fight to save the Second Amendment.****Please complete it NOW while you still can.**

**[Complete the NRA's OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN VERIFICATION TODAY to help us move forward with the best possible strategy to SAVE THE SECOND AMENDMENT.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)**

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: **NRA**
Subject: The NRA has a new survey

**[OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN VERIFICATION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)**
**DO YOU AGREE THAT EVERY LAW-ABIDING CITIZEN IS ENTITLED TO THE RIGHT TO SELF-DEFENSE?**

**[YES»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)**

**[NO»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)**

Peter,

The NRA needs YOU to see this.

As the nation's largest organization dedicated to defending the Second Amendment rights of EVERY American citizen, **we rely heavily on the input of law-abiding firearm owners like YOU.**

We're contacting you today for your input on our **[Official Survey on Gun Verification.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)** _Without your response, our mission to defend your rights from the gun-grabbers will be even more difficult._
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)**
Our nation has reached a crossroads regarding gun rights; _never before have we seen such brazen attempts to disarm the American People._ If we're going to stop radical anti-gun politicians from DESTROYING the Second Amendment, we MUST have a plan.

Peter, can you step up and help the NRA form a winning strategy to protect YOUR rights?
**[GIVE YOUR INPUT»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)**
While the anti-gunners rely on _**dark-money billionaires**_ to set their agenda, the NRA gets its input from red-blooded American patriots. It's grassroots supporters like you who power our movement.

**[Please use this personalized link to take the NRA's Official Survey on Gun Verification and help protect YOUR rights.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)**

Thank you,

NRA

**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62392994:J5pU3JGbN:m:1:3365131770:677110C6834C763A8D496B626B3B768A:r)**

Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America

You were added to the system October 12, 2022.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJ5pU3JGbN). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJ5pU3JGbN)

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651077%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pBO%2bIBhYWslc6BexqB5rRQ&sysid=1) |
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651078%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nlWW%2fJAzH9cnTCK54G8zAw&sysid=1)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651079%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NlmOupCZ%2fPffDxuoUmZ%2bkg&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651070%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B8YS3VIe2pHb7GgROroYiw&sysid=1) For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale’s American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c651078%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nlWW%2fJAzH9cnTCK54G8zAw&sysid=1)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1792%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=G9C5B4mH%2bj3e7zAivLEh9w&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1792%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=G9C5B4mH%2bj3e7zAivLEh9w&sysid=1)

name: American Briefing
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy.

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zng4e5i68kb691rgv3o7kqthsdkrabomd9jft9ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h61ob6cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9i1lolv6t4m2g887211eo55eivrhb13c5vs13ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h61ob6cph2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty — the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpoh60b0cpm9gmml3v04kbnk2pc9h51hp0jsa5tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1h61ob6cph2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Your America
subject: Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy?
body:
Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system.

| **Why are Bezos and Musk Investing Billions to ‘Transform’ the American Economy? And What Does It Mean for Your Money?** Something strange is happening behind the scenes in our financial system. Right now, the mainstream media is completely ignoring what might be the most important story in the financial world that nobody is talking about. Amid the distractions caused by conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation, Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at an event called COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world’s most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President, Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a [$150 trillion ‘global transition’ of our economy. ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09960%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l8pVMR9RmVUk5WXm%2f9dg6A&sysid=1) Since then, Bank of America has committed, along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world’s biggest companies. Several billionaires, led by Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this ‘transformation’ as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for with their ‘transformation’? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins, who predicted the 2008 market meltdown has followed the money... And what she’s discovered is startling. It has nothing to do with a market crash... a new reserve currency... or the end of fiat. Prins says: **“While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines, I’ve found evidence the elites are spending $150 trillion to ‘transform’ our economy into something we didn’t vote on ... didn’t ask for... and very few are prepared for.** **In essence, we’re about to see a stranger, more extreme ‘new normal’ in America.** **Most people will be shocked when they see what happens in the months ahead.”** Prins considers this transformation so urgent, she has agreed to sit down for an interview to get her message in front of as many Americans as possible. For now, there’s no cost to watch. [Go here to see how this ‘transformation’ could affect you - and find out what it means for your money.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09961%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K1vz%2fU30NouygZ3Iq%2fJp4w&sysid=1) [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c09962%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zt68ipM%2b%2faOJAJSyIDMKAQ&sysid=1)
---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7113%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=lcPgLBUVHrCgPZVRj%2bKulg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7113%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=lcPgLBUVHrCgPZVRj%2bKulg&sysid=1)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c8f2ac816f84245ae427913641fd01a&_e=o4Wdn-BZfUlSGzj0mlWM46l_6aaSvTaFJtLEOkeEFspJH5W-j0BX558qdyxxc4HlDUwWE0UKRzUczYvHQxeVxVBVvSAOhgJnkyQKAhWPmy2QYQxP1hE8kkNfLACd1WKSZ12iID2aRPpra-iaJWmsSMWtLSb_lOZC9Aufp_78yx0EKIaNHSiI_fWmCWGZ-GzqAbxEDHyHsqZ8YT2arc-osZiOufzBE6Z7zuKgck1STZgG6KL5TFbWFlv53tJFLOobyowtiNGWzaj203TmMp0CVr9EZhd6mWq4We6m44Z3gonGV6YCkWKhPvr3BmZZaI6bDM10EqTmKzw3BbwuRXn7qdpS8iw-fnHCwJVk3lLQD39zkdPfVUr-RX-1qjVmqFLMjGal1RJ-oWPea9rM8b2GQg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c8f2ac816f84245ae427913641fd01a&_e=o4Wdn-BZfUlSGzj0mlWM46l_6aaSvTaFJtLEOkeEFspJH5W-j0BX558qdyxxc4HlDUwWE0UKRzUczYvHQxeVxVBVvSAOhgJnkyQKAhWPmy2QYQxP1hE8kkNfLACd1WKSZ12iID2aRPpra-iaJWmsSMWtLSb_lOZC9Aufp_78yx0EKIaNHSiI_fWmCWGZ-GzqAbxEDHyHsqZ8YT2arc-osZiOufzBE6Z7zuKgck1STZgG6KL5TFbWFlv53tJFLOob3j_afPk3P8o2O4gaKOrRLswnPvdSdRV4sb8kwWkz66OoNrkYhXKNrO43ZkspFpU2o6gdHUlRnTPIPiieY0KGqEx8217AVNHjpr7x1CgurXfAMrzDkj-AVjdKMkUU2oCNnDeQyLx8AtKGohB9W7X9JA%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0c8f2ac816f84245ae427913641fd01a&_e=o4Wdn-BZfUlSGzj0mlWM46l_6aaSvTaFJtLEOkeEFspJH5W-j0BX558qdyxxc4HlDUwWE0UKRzUczYvHQxeVxVBVvSAOhgJnkyQKAhWPmy2QYQxP1hE8kkNfLACd1WKSZ12iID2aRPpra-iaJWmsSMWtLSb_lOZC9Aufp_78yx0EKIaNHSiI_fWmCWGZ-GzqAbxEDHyHsqZ8YT2arc-osZiOufzBE6Z7zuKgck1STZgG6KL5TFbWFlv53tJFLOobpuDNZc7YDAC4-tsR-y0LSKsjZnjDJqdN0Ov2GfZRV1dfhwIvYV8PZyWFhQHgYqqQ5FvTg515kkVVxc2kGwmTNpd894rRXrkSn4C9TdpgfK3_hQXtK1CXAxSWzxqJQw7-RXUh-Ajkv-4ZvRsRqvtQKw%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f4bd4a2d83946d19a27724fd72b734c&_e=UqFyv0GTynfD283NqCFh8ea_uLLUiO7DicQipTxvg71vngzCRbPZBz7iWD7K1ySIgcbv2aAl7oLNgjJrVtVi0tfW57I4i-MjpzCUPEDd2m7smCvwjHDL6Z_kVV-N6JdBlbKb3-jYS0GP7LAYlE1ktbc2Pv8PAeOW5oqv22JDYw2zYKeaoGnLaE4f1iRowhF1z8ALdPp22I02synR8Jpe9xlMuZoOl0HZcIMflJ5OiOR2pl7AOoNt7sB4OR9FTZKAaaNNTgvGDLP8vWo9m80Y4wUgU71LNnXpcn4SEUbQ3Vg6LJsa8YFhoGbbyAiT5SsH661k7WNxabHbO5OjxkmckfCerGyZJNs-aQhoAC4YmqJJg3uVGw-XMjSzuXB_fjM8h1qr-S67CgWpO87dONYfaw%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0f4bd4a2d83946d19a27724fd72b734c&_e=UqFyv0GTynfD283NqCFh8ea_uLLUiO7DicQipTxvg71vngzCRbPZBz7iWD7K1ySIgcbv2aAl7oLNgjJrVtVi0tfW57I4i-MjpzCUPEDd2m7smCvwjHDL6Z_kVV-N6JdBlbKb3-jYS0GP7LAYlE1ktbc2Pv8PAeOW5oqv22JDYw2zYKeaoGnLaE4f1iRowhF1z8ALdPp22I02synR8Jpe9xlMuZoOl0HZcIMflJ5OiOR2pl7AOoNt7sB4OR9FTZKAX1LINrai1b0aNDGPWEI2gPjGT1V2PNO1fDbjlr7IJEdKY19fYTtRhkwpJrtuhjSZKNEPihJ7mHnnu5IMQIE-0TBC3rJn0QZ92a0OAeF3bZg58z7wwzsE6txir9hgU0NZvnZx14ZZY9oPwxSSfOpUQA%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=314ed5368d1e4eaaab6d693d467710da&_e=lanpapXIE_bju0N6EezuRgjK3rBQfcaU6zQAryq9oiRm8IRqPvOVT78PQ8cjLNvLzzgRkBfMTYzZ6hHNZWKCN2nt8ShTuuDjPKWnVussVJ9do_V620BBE_82JQuYtPtYm82pj16Gyna2I_OyIwkyD34TedN_f4LRWYNmAo1JuvGGvBKdwI1B0eeOLwNIOW6trEpU47LB_4YcV5-6Bkaqf505pTg8XEMZtUBjlpAxN1_gGgqJvjaZ3C2K5ILu8hFW3lUi3EGhc2PNmD5q6MtTvP2piqyGt3M2ZDJiPTMqLZM_RVsSIkdbTL8O9K8Q-WGAzfbH2p0Hlx78MKLqxeuruqD9xI0ZAoVHxiPh93WU4yV1wk1no6IERWVNeQE_u9QnnSVE3gvgMW9Df2xcU44Hvr_I7CtUQwmMrmAmyuXpZWJFhe9bL1fzD2ZlRbxEK45f)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=314ed5368d1e4eaaab6d693d467710da&_e=lanpapXIE_bju0N6EezuRgjK3rBQfcaU6zQAryq9oiRm8IRqPvOVT78PQ8cjLNvLzzgRkBfMTYzZ6hHNZWKCN2nt8ShTuuDjPKWnVussVJ9do_V620BBE_82JQuYtPtYm82pj16Gyna2I_OyIwkyD34TedN_f4LRWYNmAo1JuvGGvBKdwI1B0eeOLwNIOW6trEpU47LB_4YcV5-6Bkaqf505pTg8XEMZtUBjlpAxN1_gGgqJvjaZ3C2K5ILu8hFW3lUi3EGhc2PNmD5q6MtTvDLkA1JaydGoy6UAUcMcz42cjwZej4L_UJccodU2x2BDrzF3wzBhy9qFrGS4U70rMLYbTPQdDTwuurQSL3H7Du3qcedx4sUfZOJWKanP0RIGRfLcXJrolgnKtiqQe7O1h1MPdR5_Nj2ABLfj8HfEnL_Xd0rKDMRVwHfzRgz5JWhH)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=314ed5368d1e4eaaab6d693d467710da&_e=lanpapXIE_bju0N6EezuRgjK3rBQfcaU6zQAryq9oiRm8IRqPvOVT78PQ8cjLNvLzzgRkBfMTYzZ6hHNZWKCN2nt8ShTuuDjPKWnVussVJ9do_V620BBE_82JQuYtPtYm82pj16Gyna2I_OyIwkyD34TedN_f4LRWYNmAo1JuvGGvBKdwI1B0eeOLwNIOW6trEpU47LB_4YcV5-6Bkaqf505pTg8XEMZtUBjlpAxN1_gGgqJvjaZ3C2K5ILu8hFW3lUi3EGhc2PNmD5q6MtTvCpNn8SbRkgvaNm8_8z7DOAP2gvRFYBIop4lGSRv7rWh7FHgJatYYOiZE6kPtFLoMahhF8Z0XkE45fs4opnwIqwKz-BdChkiY57W7_S60gpLtoy1LQc765rLiFbUs4dcL7juFZYs0va8_UFiaIVQVreVo36eZh62d8qZwe5l25ey)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=314ed5368d1e4eaaab6d693d467710da&_e=lanpapXIE_bju0N6EezuRgjK3rBQfcaU6zQAryq9oiRm8IRqPvOVT78PQ8cjLNvLzzgRkBfMTYzZ6hHNZWKCN2nt8ShTuuDjPKWnVussVJ9do_V620BBE_82JQuYtPtYm82pj16Gyna2I_OyIwkyD34TedN_f4LRWYNmAo1JuvGGvBKdwI1B0eeOLwNIOW6trEpU47LB_4YcV5-6Bkaqf505pTg8XEMZtUBjlpAxN1_gGgqJvjaZ3C2K5ILu8hFW3lUi3EGhc2PNmD5q6MtTvMWI14_u6meiXfkwAwCdIRM5tJIGhOEALHaKe4HP5FSyEJZ47m5sH1_HvHuiT0Wgj2WWoyntGom067AqpTkv-EP-A6Xd9wcJiim73VkFVfW1LMz4mON8A7GwNAEBUZmXnqVwjRzwlWBOI9dbOdX4B4g5cy2dfrON1jpSZtqPFgOg).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpmp6pd6ska2dl2ie19lkmsbt3ljva8jsl1g1dng_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1j64o34c3h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zukhpj9fc3i3gbrqtnn9taes99gojjirkbpeptao_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1j64o34c3h2bs) [NO](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmih3342chfflpq15o51mnarvts25rlnt95kl3vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1j64o34c3h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn6nja7qv07iit8qsga57p79612kjmntvd43atj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1j64o34c3h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztdnj8ik4gqf66iha6kcaeu2g86871e023340rho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0s1j64o34c3h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

| Michele Blair, Sage's Mom Appomattox County, VA

| Dear Friend,
I am honored to receive the endorsement of Sage's mom Michele Blair of Appomattox County, VA for my race for State Senate District 10. We worked together on a bill I chief co-patroned to require schools inform parents when their children indicate they are a different gender. The Democrat State Senate then killed this bill because they believe schools know better than parents and because they believe parents do not have their children's best interest in mind. I gave much testimony on this bill. I also said in Senate Education Committee, no bill, or law, or government entity will ever love a child more than their parents. As your State Senator, I will make sure we pass this bill into law to inform parents and ensure we fully support parental rights.
---

---|---
|
"I heartily endorse John McGuire for Virginia Senate as a strong leader for protecting children and families. As a Delegate in the recent session of the Assembly, John played an important role in helping pass Sage's Law through the House. Sage's Law protects children and parental rights, and was named after our daughter, who suffered terrible abuse and was sex trafficked after her high school concealed from us her claim to be a different gender identity at school. I [testified in the Virginia Assembly](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001PsTx7iywKN4p56cTrxnXhZkagAaS2ORt5ODypuxlQdYaFuIaNIfA_eR-8XkT3QneG2mfECOlRkHRgrIu7UEtUmnxuZdlt7L846twT4qYGlGxj39biinwlV-JHZYyTkMiNSwD_o1NpbbXaxJg2AwjgCz5hfC1OBde4O_NLLMfoUlPo-BgIoapWEIcFyAIpKouGd3tZmhc-agopsC6vBlG5Q0V8jtTrLswn_2k5fKjSXlZQT0tirzujSpV3PmXyE6q7-ZKA2b4I1pRILOGk6MuzJjRfRLDcXC4aiAPYUpubrQimMa9mRphiGDKC4QHAqiMELUMM2s6FdFpKJdhXQrHxmFMTyG8UGyqP4Z7hqEIkfUtQSFEkEClQixvxBnZueocRz5UEm_AjB0=&c=mghhCoonwbRHDHVcMXvTB9k4lF-zLTkOzcfadix1Wb01wLq4ysiQog==&ch=USWlr8lWotBu6We4NOdzx2IVAS_FCQzkGkbfvcg03lZ_tsEx7pd5_g==) about the horrific domino effect of that deceit. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Activist doctors are harming our children
body:
Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente 's multi-billion-dollar __industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy._
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=73c442aa8a7a4f969162a828dae3d479&_e=rc8xMGJex5e2RaEEvu7CL8b93ryxe0_vwmt1J_sIhdCTvub2NmfDK5ywu0Bm5LsCSm-gLTrZVCq5PcSC18aZORzAGy87s2W3XjYUlrwGkS4Cr5eOFCZVZ0I1QLhO7Njd0ojqPHfZ5p8T1ekUuumHWXEQ0_JGkPgld_EoyBWMs7A8M9t_1nA96oAQSUKnu188G2Bk8YRAPuLUfgFInWHtU-IpUe1xg0Cg72zZKMUZtgC6GjVfTmcP08ZdGii6XxPDb3Fq-ted8_2VHxG4DiY_TzwsTZud3tyDwifPknHaCUMgCqgOwe4AG3WHdPd-kf1F0Ic_2a7YLJ7Dj0ErY3YcJjgRsNgXXvoA3YQNfM4hDNJGAiV4TnvAGIvqzqe8E6TrhW6zYHFyhC4IwAM97_KrcA%3D%3D)
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders. And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy. | | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to "test" their "gender affirming care." Now for the rest of Chloe's life, her voice will always be deeper, she'll never be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit. And this is happening to children across America. My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... ... and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. Winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll shut them down.** Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat. | | Thank you for standing up for Chloe and for kids like her across the country. | | Thank you and God Bless, | | Harmeet K. Fellow American,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans-that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facdc9cb94484d609a917e6239fc9638&_e=UzKdbSOobPwB4pZZvjdUxeRjkjVBFmrVmddcEhZxOMApgcF6ChdQV0qnL10gDKsn9M7VeFROD6p--jraiuIJrdiQQPHyfR1Ua1JraUELCsI-v3AJKmWrZgjUnVrjureKTIyan0_Qy4NN52cQAtnH8L9lWiVCp5zaZ3VGPBwecygBokhvgBmUY0NItmjT99kiym8uLddxkoiY8wuk2Cbhe0UbtQU9CfcjhSleLHYXt6E3ri_viKz9i0ntPBng70sZTRXwiu-EfX8j8t_Pta2jiTP4FHjAlNg-knuOfJreW9c68-cI3dwnbYQpLeqIABiedXJEHPMu9PqcpuhHXFp31VBxqFKqPIGEVyOVQ3FyBGb-iVXJsCUV1LYSUeVCZr2ZLcEGV64VyjS-lz5clPgzv6E8tABHPyW2Q75-BmaWTawJoe5ri08l5Uw5k8br0Jxp)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facdc9cb94484d609a917e6239fc9638&_e=UzKdbSOobPwB4pZZvjdUxeRjkjVBFmrVmddcEhZxOMApgcF6ChdQV0qnL10gDKsn9M7VeFROD6p--jraiuIJrdiQQPHyfR1Ua1JraUELCsI-v3AJKmWrZgjUnVrjureKTIyan0_Qy4NN52cQAtnH8L9lWiVCp5zaZ3VGPBwecygBokhvgBmUY0NItmjT99kiym8uLddxkoiY8wuk2Cbhe0UbtQU9CfcjhSleLHYXt6E3ri_viKz9i0ntPBng70sZTRXwiu-EfX8j8t_Pta2jiQ_B-Ee1awI14cWB1EY9-5_YzQRGxF7WF1ayHbC-Lhw0mwoyUig6Nd-ctEQzBsBAY9s5TxAGpYqymmR9_5KdPaQDxWqUCLHDlUJ9Eumb3lHVnkmHmMw7LgPnn13Tla8fOtQeBQPXqd3yI2zwZLS42tO2v5r3j0IewiYTlhw2cROX)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facdc9cb94484d609a917e6239fc9638&_e=UzKdbSOobPwB4pZZvjdUxeRjkjVBFmrVmddcEhZxOMApgcF6ChdQV0qnL10gDKsn9M7VeFROD6p--jraiuIJrdiQQPHyfR1Ua1JraUELCsI-v3AJKmWrZgjUnVrjureKTIyan0_Qy4NN52cQAtnH8L9lWiVCp5zaZ3VGPBwecygBokhvgBmUY0NItmjT99kiym8uLddxkoiY8wuk2Cbhe0UbtQU9CfcjhSleLHYXt6E3ri_viKz9i0ntPBng70sZTRXwiu-EfX8j8t_Pta2jiYpL_40zqlZm9vy3BFLVusM2mvHyfE8TNvZs09X9-IuJCqw6p7RvdszmN3YZkNAsSik90WeY85AUQulEBz36AKrJvNtTBjxHV34X3r9yUxBPzNXRv1VcRbmy7-hnRXu3AL417LChvAHE1iBbQA341XU34gkQfbt5nk02ciGFuVLT)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facdc9cb94484d609a917e6239fc9638&_e=UzKdbSOobPwB4pZZvjdUxeRjkjVBFmrVmddcEhZxOMApgcF6ChdQV0qnL10gDKsn9M7VeFROD6p--jraiuIJrdiQQPHyfR1Ua1JraUELCsI-v3AJKmWrZgjUnVrjureKTIyan0_Qy4NN52cQAtnH8L9lWiVCp5zaZ3VGPBwecygBokhvgBmUY0NItmjT99kiym8uLddxkoiY8wuk2Cbhe0UbtQU9CfcjhSleLHYXt6E3ri_viKz9i0ntPBng70sZTRXwiu-EfX8j8t_Pta2jiW6epvssEnOBZCDj0MoHFwhetfIsjuRyJ-7r9uGnuAX7c8R889PY62IOr_JSHmw2nzt0BnbateSKIVhQqyQ3R0bgBtIsQWL5-r11hCibtPLG27RVgNqXD14uMpSWZlNPDNnzuTeCp9S2Jw6-fYEutjyQZ247qk3bCT1dksTbF91u)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facdc9cb94484d609a917e6239fc9638&_e=UzKdbSOobPwB4pZZvjdUxeRjkjVBFmrVmddcEhZxOMApgcF6ChdQV0qnL10gDKsn9M7VeFROD6p--jraiuIJrdiQQPHyfR1Ua1JraUELCsI-v3AJKmWrZgjUnVrjureKTIyan0_Qy4NN52cQAtnH8L9lWiVCp5zaZ3VGPBwecygBokhvgBmUY0NItmjT99kiym8uLddxkoiY8wuk2Cbhe0UbtQU9CfcjhSleLHYXt6E3ri_viKz9i0ntPBng70sZTRXwiu-EfX8j8t_Pta2jiYR2297uAK1L65_4e80XWtEOkZQR-wJtB1_p83RriMrHd699xguAlEQ6jTyk3a8pepUFV2U3na7PqJaTG3aJCzpHBL-SwrFTjEweCaRH8GcTNQo8llQOB9vn3hEdEU9S06RQgYTJin3b_BwqOX77edtCFU1LuFv2YJ9rMB1RkUi0)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facdc9cb94484d609a917e6239fc9638&_e=UzKdbSOobPwB4pZZvjdUxeRjkjVBFmrVmddcEhZxOMApgcF6ChdQV0qnL10gDKsn9M7VeFROD6p--jraiuIJrdiQQPHyfR1Ua1JraUELCsI-v3AJKmWrZgjUnVrjureKTIyan0_Qy4NN52cQAtnH8L9lWiVCp5zaZ3VGPBwecygBokhvgBmUY0NItmjT99kiym8uLddxkoiY8wuk2Cbhe0UbtQU9CfcjhSleLHYXt6E3ri_viKz9i0ntPBng70sZTRXwiu-EfX8j8t_Pta2jidYA6kkSoyMwDi6TyATVAzND9LP6SoZG4-OqGRnfgR9ZDJINcF4LOU0k_MWXLTaceIlkYjPcqTz7XGzqcVxg3a_bvpaB4G845SRE-T2qFMR71Px-_zCwPNkEbeEnfnLRwS6H7rMWhvjPzOkrz28AgIWpjx8MZrEdj9pm1xvWVG6m)

---

| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facdc9cb94484d609a917e6239fc9638&_e=UzKdbSOobPwB4pZZvjdUxahKAicTXH4cbhfagJuXH8ptkmlLHcXjrfUfaQ_KxXiS_2ksijMoVIpyIN-i-U98-ytI71Olk65xxJaUEFmsXawD_rWQP5aiyOWnZ4ABmst2NKGuth_bJAdx4A3KmSvK3gbgq6KlUcqSWYdYSNLHAACeJdP-LejY6rj0FJowZo2AInBmxXA1aKFxjVtBahg3J_sQmeqcFEKmqVUeFf-0hbI%3D) | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facdc9cb94484d609a917e6239fc9638&_e=UzKdbSOobPwB4pZZvjdUxca-kRDJeAWFbe21uBlh6oAahHNlCKUFgXUrO-Tmx10T3R9KKf7UCJqsLY7-Gy4yxZBfrIawRu7Aqf6UqtBx4xASit3aZo44oLR66u81A9NiwD_resWd2-AAX38kXWEGm4Q7x9T_dkdCM1qh8QRsACd0HWcjyNWMrHQpEDP0BroPICWT7Oty-n4RUZT1XLHUHA%3D%3D) | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=facdc9cb94484d609a917e6239fc9638&_e=UzKdbSOobPwB4pZZvjdUxQ_llXlgm6VL64_T-41yVqBF3HU3kUPxeR1FHe4kQ3tVYDeRfbt6Ecrl-EyZa6tFcCpCrDo3Sl7xQPo-Ni4KfBfukIzM7B9Y49DlScIXpRknkngXz1Y2jPGY2G0SayJggBed9_snQWpMSc8AYL37cAx1iiXmfw8vMppR-Zha68qT_SXQuz0m4fTnRgT2jcIpGA_nLy3ubUdgOVKu4a1WQXM%3D)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0c05723b-22b4-490b-b923-566ba0cb9e2b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: Democrats are keeping secrets
body:
The 2023 legislative session has passed the halfway mark, with Democrats still pushing ridiculous pro-criminal and higher-tax policies. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61564134:Wn5wQKDsN:m:1:2610672541:5FA0EC413117BBAF50EF2C498D3A4609:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

The 2023 legislative session has passed the halfway mark, with Democrats still pushing ridiculous pro-criminal and higher-tax policies. And as always, we here at Shift WA have you covered with some of this week's most read stories and insights into what is going on in your own political backyard! Read on...

**This week 's Newsmaker Interview...**
GOP Representative Carolyn Eslick (39th LD) joined us this week to discuss her innovative "Student First" legislation to give parents "the resources they need to help their children achieve their dreams." She also explained why she opposes the Democrats' irresponsible legislation which will reduce student instruction time by four hours a week. Finally, Representative Eslick gave us her thoughts on improving public safety in the state, including repealing the Democrats' disastrous 2021 restrictions on police pursuits which nearly every law enforcement agency in the state says is the cause for the state's high crime rate. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61564135:Wn5wQKDsN:m:1:2610672541:5FA0EC413117BBAF50EF2C498D3A4609:r)**.**

**This week 's top story...**
Democrats in Olympia are attempting to hide what they are scheming to do to us behind closed doors by trying to illegally circumvent government transparency regulations. It appears that Democrats did not learn their lesson after the shellacking they experienced at the hands of the press when they attempted to pass legislation (Senate Bill 6617) exempting themselves from the prying eyes of the public in 2017. Democratic "leaders" House Speaker Laurie Jinkins and Senate Majority Leader Andy Billig are using a newly discovered "Legislative privilege" to redact and hide legislative records from the public and the press. [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61564136:Wn5wQKDsN:m:1:2610672541:5FA0EC413117BBAF50EF2C498D3A4609:r)**.
**
**In case you missed it (from our Daily Briefing) ... **
It turns out that political lifer Lisa Brown had a different reason last year for having taxpayers move her state Commerce Department office from Olympia to Spokane - it was so taxpayers could help finance her preparations for yet another political campaign, which she announced last week. The former state legislator (20 years) and congressional wannabe (lost in 2018) wasted little time before launching another effort to secure a taxpayer-funded paycheck. As the folks at Spokane's Good Government Alliance pointed out, "Brown may have a Spokane address, but her beliefs on critical issues make it clear that she really only prioritizes the parts of Washington State that can be viewed from the top of the Space Needle." (KHQ, Spokane Good Government Alliance). [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61564137:Wn5wQKDsN:m:1:2610672541:5FA0EC413117BBAF50EF2C498D3A4609:r)**.**

**In case you missed it (from our Daily Briefing) ... **
The Washington State Ferries can always count on other state transit agencies to make it look good by comparison, as with the latest news that the agency may be able to return service to Sidney, British Columbia, by 2030, or sometime after the second Biden (or Trump) term. But the ferry service may be able to return the Bremerton-Seattle run to full service after Labor Day - no need to rush for the busy summer season. Good thing all those ferry employees are vaccinated. (The News Tribune) [**Read more**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61564138:Wn5wQKDsN:m:1:2610672541:5FA0EC413117BBAF50EF2C498D3A4609:r)**.**

P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by [**clicking here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61564139:Wn5wQKDsN:m:1:2610672541:5FA0EC413117BBAF50EF2C498D3A4609:r)**.**

AND with Twitter under new ownership, and if that's a news source for you, we hope you will take a moment to follow us today by clicking [**here**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61564140:Wn5wQKDsN:m:1:2610672541:5FA0EC413117BBAF50EF2C498D3A4609:r)**!**

| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61564141:Wn5wQKDsN:m:1:2610672541:5FA0EC413117BBAF50EF2C498D3A4609:r)
---
|

If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14151007&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWn5wQKDsN).

As the folks at Spokane's Good Government Alliance pointed out, "Brown may have a Spokane address, but her beliefs on critical issues make it clear that she really only prioritizes the parts of Washington State that can be viewed from the top of the Space Needle." (KHQ, Spokane Good Government Alliance). . In case you missed it (from our Daily Briefing) ... The Washington State Ferries can always count on other state transit agencies to make it look good by comparison, as with the latest news that the agency may be able to return service to Sidney, British Columbia, by 2030, or sometime after the second Biden (or Trump) term. But the ferry service may be able to return the Bremerton-Seattle run to full service after Labor Day - no need to rush for the busy summer season. Good thing all those ferry employees are vaccinated. (The News Tribune) . P.S. Have you signed up for our Daily Briefing? If not, please take a moment to sign up now by . AND with Twitter under new ownership, and if that's a news source for you, we hope you will take a moment to follow us today by clicking ! | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can to do so. You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on & . If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, .

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Did Joe throw a punch at me?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
I'm not afraid to do what it takes to get us there and that's why Biden and his allies consider me Washington's biggest enemy.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393026:64yFMJGNt:m:1:3365131770:4902FE098F035D0F47D57863ED5CCBB7:r "Headline") Peter: It's working! The more we put pressure on Joe Biden and his wayward policies, the more he's complaining to his supporters about it. He's deflecting and now trying to make me the butt of his jokes. But I want to make one thing clear, he's damaging our great nation and it's no laughing matter. I called him out at the State of the Union because our economy is in shambles, and he lied about it. He lied about our border being overrun by terrorists and illegal border invaders. China is attacking us from a cyber war to spy balloons and he's doing nothing about it. **[Unfortunately, nothing is going to change unless we keep calling out the lies. Will you chip in a donation of $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and help me keep pressure up on old Joe?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393026:64yFMJGNt:m:1:3365131770:4902FE098F035D0F47D57863ED5CCBB7:r "Unfortunately, nothing is going to change unless we keep calling
out the lies. Will you chip in a donation of $25, $50 or $100 TODAY and help me keep pressure up on old Joe?")** Ask the families in East Palestine, Ohio if they think Biden is in their corner as much as he is with the people in the Ukraine. [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393026:64yFMJGNt:m:1:3365131770:4902FE098F035D0F47D57863ED5CCBB7:r "Video")Ask the parents of the children dying from fentanyl if they think Biden cares about this crisis. So far, Joe only seems to care about controlling our lives and enriching his family. He's doing it with a weaponized FBI, DOJ and IRS, and he expects us to pay for it. That's why I'm working hard in Congress to investigate and expose his corruption. It's no longer about if Biden will be caught, but just a matter of when we release the smoking gun and remove him from office. **[That's why I need you by my side in this fight with a donation of ANY amount you can afford.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393026:64yFMJGNt:m:1:3365131770:4902FE098F035D0F47D57863ED5CCBB7:r "That’s why I need you by my side in this fight with a
donation of ANY amount you can afford.")** **Biden 's attacks on me are no different than when Hillary referred to us as "deplorables."** These elitists have disdain for us because they know we value freedom and will stand in their way so they try to refocus the media on anything other than their own actions. **Biden doesn 't want us holding him accountable for his crimes any more than he wants us holding China accountable for spreading COVID-19 around the globe.** He'd rather just find a way to blame President Trump and freedom-loving Americans like you for standing in his way. It's that same attitude that caused crazy people to attack me in restaurants recently. Blaming others has he and Maxine Waters encouraging their supporters to attack conservatives again--it's out-of-control! **[Will you chip in at least $50 TODAY and stand with me in this fight?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393025:64yFMJGNt:m:1:3365131770:4902FE098F035D0F47D57863ED5CCBB7:r "Will you chip in at least $50 TODAY and stand with me in this
fight?")** We need to save our country and bring it back to its greatness. I'm not afraid to do what it takes to get us there and that's why Biden and his allies consider me Washington's biggest enemy. They know I won't sleep until Biden is held accountable and that's why they're doing everything they can to stop me. **[Help make sure I have the ammo to fight back against the Washington establishment, the leftist media and the Biden Corruption Machine. Donate TODAY!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393026:64yFMJGNt:m:1:3365131770:4902FE098F035D0F47D57863ED5CCBB7:r "Help make sure I have the ammo to fight back against the Washington establishment, the leftist media and the Biden Corruption Machine. Donate
TODAY!")** The Swamp's attacks against me are relentless, but with you in my corner, it's all worth it and I will find a way to endure their smears. Thank you for your continued support. Yours in the fight, Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)
---
| **PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC.**
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Senator Sinema is #1...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Here is an important difference between how Senator Sinema has used her power in the Senate, and how I will approach the job.
#

Peter —
Here is an important difference between how Senator Sinema has used her power in the Senate, and how I will approach the job.
Fact:
Senator Sinema is ranked #1 among current Senators in donations from the payday lending industry.
Those are the predatory lenders who will give struggling people cash up-front at interest rates that would make loan shark blush.
If you’ve ever served in the military or been near a military industry, you see a lot of these places looking to take advantage of service members' guaranteed pay, even if it leaves families trapped in a spiral of debt.
As a Senator, she has worked to loosen enforcement on those predatory lenders. She has sided with Republicans to support them.
And she has been rewarded financially for her help.
That’s not been my career in Congress and it certainly won’t be in the Senate. The ultra-wealthy and financial predators like the payday loan industry don’t need more advocates in Washington.
To state the obvious, those powerful forces won’t be donating to our campaign. Instead, we rely on lots and lots of people donating what they can to fight back.
[**Please contribute $3 to my campaign or whatever amount sounds worth having a Senator who will fight back against predatory lenders taking advantage of hard-working Americans.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar23.PJzORo&refcode=em230305-1-30-15gm&t=1&akid=435%2E734936%2EIPRNjm)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

subject: Emergency action to stop illegal immigration
body:
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394700:6ox5zJGxN:m:1:3331421248:26F9D3EAE123EFEB0CD21456F732A841:r)
---
**BREAKING NEWS: "America First Legal & Texas File For An Emergency Injunction To Block Biden's Most Extreme Open Borders Decree..."**
Peter, Did you see the headline above recently? **The situation is dire.** The far-left is cheering as DHS attempts to roll out Biden's most insidious and radical open borders edict to date:**a parole program for illegal aliens**. **This lawless action is a threat to American sovereignty. ** That's why _America First Legal is taking action_ to stop it. We're proud to work with the courageous Ken Paxton to represent Texas and a coalition of twenty states as we seek an **emergency preliminary injunction** to shut down this pernicious program, and prevent it from injecting a new wave of illegal aliens into America. [**Support America First Legal Here >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394700:6ox5zJGxN:m:1:3331421248:26F9D3EAE123EFEB0CD21456F732A841:r) The unlawful program allows illegal aliens to obtain advance approval to enter the United States - despite no basis in the law for them doing so. And the preliminary injunction we just filed for _**will stop this program cold while we fight it in court!**_ Biden's staggeringly RADICAL plan to **mass import illegal aliens** directly to the United States without any legal basis for doing so is nothing more than a brazen attempt to accelerate stratospheric migration levels while concealing its sheer volume by transporting illegal aliens directly into the American interior. If we don't stop Biden's program the damage will be catastrophic: **a deluge of illegal migrants flooding our labor markets, burdening taxpayers, jeopardizing public health and safety, and stretching our safety net to the breaking point. ** [_To win our fight to_** _stop this traitorous campaign_** _to transform our country with mass illegal immigration we need your help. Please support our efforts right now with a generous donation,_**_thank you! >> _**_ _](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394700:6ox5zJGxN:m:1:3331421248:26F9D3EAE123EFEB0CD21456F732A841:r) _Thank you for your crucial support as we fight this lawless scheme!_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal

name: LucasKunce.com
subject: Lucas needs your input, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Can you take a few minutes today to share your thoughts?
#
Peter,
It’s only been a couple months since Lucas launched his campaign to replace Josh Hawley and already a LOT has happened.
Between repeated attempts to strip away Social Security benefits from the workers who earned them and the Big Brother attacks by corrupt politicians on everyday people, it’s never been clearer that we need to send a real warrior for working people to the U.S. Senate next year.
Lucas is building a grassroots movement fueled by input from working people just like you who are ready to take back their power from the corrupt elites stripping our communities for parts. **That’s why we’re reaching out today:**
**[Will you take a minute or two to share your thoughts with Lucas by filling out our March 2023 priorities survey? Knowing the issues you think are most important will be invaluable as we work to defeat Josh Hawley and take Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back for the people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230305-1-survey?t=1&akid=2847%2E614464%2Ee5Mzlw)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230305-1-survey?t=2&akid=2847%2E614464%2Ee5Mzlw)**
The campaign we’re building isn’t like any other Missouri has ever seen. We’re not taking any cues from the corrupt elites and corporate insiders who’ve spent decades dominating our politics and tearing up our communities.
Part of that means we aren’t accepting any corporate PAC money in this race, so Lucas can be held fully accountable to the people he’ll be elected to serve. But it also means we’re relying on feedback from real voters like you, so Lucas can understand what issues are most impacting everyday Missourians.
**[So can you please take a moment to fill out our March 2023 survey? Your input will help us understand how we can be most responsive to our supporters and build a winning campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230305-1-survey?t=3&akid=2847%2E614464%2Ee5Mzlw)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/survey/lk-email-20230305-1-survey?t=4&akid=2847%2E614464%2Ee5Mzlw)**
Thanks for your help!
Team Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230305-2847-footer&t=5&refcode2=2847_614464_e5Mzlw&akid=2847%2E614464%2Ee5Mzlw)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2847%2E614464%2Ee5Mzlw). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

As a key member of this team, you know how critical the 2022 midterm elections were for our party. Thanks to your unwavering support, we were able to secure important victories that will help continue to build a better America. body:

Hi there,
Today, we want to talk to you about an organization doing critical work to promote peace and security by advocating for a more sustainable and just world: the Council for a Livable World.
The Council for a Livable World is leading the charge in advocating for policies that promote peace and reduce the need for nuclear weapons – all things that are critical to Granite Staters and that Senator Hassan believes strongly in.
In today’s environment, their work is more important than ever. They’re counting on your support to build a movement that will affect real change.
**[Add your name to join the Council for a Livable World and support their important work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59688281/394855274/-2113716663?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2222-ot-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTk0NzM2YS02NmJiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m5qM29IwKNCGq1H72n8cS00r_l-UVjVYjXIv9TQa8tQ=&emci=e24d9c55-e5b9-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5594736a-66bb-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5452893)**

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: to do list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18822%2E3422442%2E8jOIPo)
Derek,
Exactly one year from today it will be primary Election Day in California! **40% of voters are undecided,** so we have a LOT of work to do to reach voters and show them who Katie is, what she stands for, and why she’s the warrior our country needs in Washington.
**[Can you contribute _$35.24_ today to help lay the groundwork for our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230305-1?source=em20230305-1&refcode2=18822_3422442_8jOIPo&akid=18822%2E3422442%2E8jOIPo)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230305-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF05_1_YEA_20230305_V1_F&refcode2=18822_3422442_8jOIPo&akid=18822%2E3422442%2E8jOIPo)**
Election analysts are saying this could be the most expensive race in the country, and running a campaign in the most populous state takes serious resources. Here are just a few of the things we have to do between now and next year:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230305-1?source=em20230305-1&refcode2=18822_3422442_8jOIPo&akid=18822%2E3422442%2E8jOIPo)
Derek, we’ll need to raise the funds to do all of these things and more, and we’re doing so _without_ taking a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Pharma and Big Oil CEOs.
We’re so appreciative of your support!
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230305-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF05_1_YEA_20230305_V1_F&refcode2=18822_3422442_8jOIPo&akid=18822%2E3422442%2E8jOIPo)**
–Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF05_1_YEA_20230305_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=18822_3422442_8jOIPo&akid=18822%2E3422442%2E8jOIPo)**
