name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Stand up to the D.C. cartel!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394716:J6iJBJGNt:m:1:3331421248:99C76C619EB9FE1132008A9B29E11615:r)
---
| | Friends, Matt Gaetz here - I just stepped off the stage at [CPAC](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394716:J6iJBJGNt:m:1:3331421248:99C76C619EB9FE1132008A9B29E11615:r) and wanted to relay my message to our entire movement.

Unlike many in the Swamp, _**I am not a human vessel for lobbyist cash.**_ I am a vindicated Florida Man who will NEVER be afraid to stand up to the D.C. Cartel on the American people's behalf!

That's precisely what I did during the Speaker vote along with 20 brave America-First Patriots. **The concessions we earned broke the Washington status quo to make sure horrible omnibus legislation, bloated bureaucrat salaries like Dr. Fauci 's, and other Swamp nightmares NEVER happen ever again in this country!**
---
| [KEEP UP THE FIGHT! STAND UP TO THE D.C. CARTEL!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394716:J6iJBJGNt:m:1:3331421248:99C76C619EB9FE1132008A9B29E11615:r "KEEP UP THE FIGHT! STAND UP TO THE D.C. CARTEL!")
---
| But, the MOST important concession we received during our fight was this: The establishment of a committee to investigate the weaponization of this government against the American People.
**And today, I had an important update to share ...**
**DEMOCRATS RIGHT NOW ARE RUNNING COVER FOR THE DEEP STATE BY TRYING TO SMEAR OUR FBI WHISTLEBLOWERS! <**
This is yet another reminder that the low-energy, Paul Ryan days of our party are over. [**We must take bold action and REMOVE these obstructionist Democrats who are blocking oversight into this weaponized government! >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394716:J6iJBJGNt:m:1:3331421248:99C76C619EB9FE1132008A9B29E11615:r)
---

---

---
| The Deep State tried to label concerned parents "domestic terrorists."

They targeted Donald Trump throughout his presidency based on Clinton-funded lies.

A former Deep State agent even tried to blackmail my family and me!

So the truth is this - _we either get this compromised government back on our side ...

...or we must ABOLISH the FBI, CDC, ATF, DOJ, and every last alphabet agency until the Deep State is finally brought to heel!_

But Democrats are fighting us tooth and nail on that front. And I need to know if you'll help me overcome their obstruction before it's too late to reign in this out-of-control D.C. Swamp...

[**Join me in calling for the REMOVAL of these America Last Democrats who are trying to keep you in the dark about the weaponization of your government! ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394716:J6iJBJGNt:m:1:3331421248:99C76C619EB9FE1132008A9B29E11615:r)

name: Giffords
subject: Look what the NRA decided to tweet...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
A nation with weak gun laws is not a safe nation. Period.
#

Take a look at this:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230305-1-15&t=1&akid=4362%2E3935704%2ExqG7cJ)
This message is what the NRA decided to promote on their Twitter account to nearly one million followers...
All while gun violence is the NUMBER ONE cause of death for our nation’s children...
And while we’re just about two months into the year and our country has already experienced over 90 mass shootings...
And after CDC data recently showed that we experienced record levels of gun deaths in 2021.
Harmful rhetoric like this tweet only further worsens our country’s gun violence crisis by creating a culture of fear.
Gun safety is about ensuring that guns do not end up in the wrong hands. It’s about preventing a child from accidentally firing their parent’s gun. It’s about ensuring that a person with an intention to do harm to others can’t access an assault weapon.
**A nation with weak gun laws is not a safe nation. Period.**
That’s why our work at Giffords continues on.
Even while the NRA’s membership is declining amid scandal, they’re still a powerful force that we remain up against. It is going to take a lot for us to stand up to the power they hold over so many of our politicians, as well as their large sums of money.
[**So please, will you chip in $3 or any amount you can afford to Giffords PAC today? It all adds up in our fight to stand up to the NRA’s dangerous agenda.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar23.q3bw9s&refcode=em230305-1-15&t=2&akid=4362%2E3935704%2ExqG7cJ)

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: A nation with weak gun laws is not a safe nation. Period. Take a look at this: This message is what the NRA decided to promote on their Twitter account to nearly one million followers... All while gun violence is the NUMBER ONE cause of death for our nation’s children... And while we’re just about two months into the year and our country has already experienced over 90 mass shootings... And after CDC data recently showed that we experienced record levels of gun deaths in 2021. Harmful rhetoric like this tweet only further worsens our country’s gun violence crisis by creating a culture of fear. Gun safety is about ensuring that guns do not end up in the wrong hands. It’s about preventing a child from accidentally firing their parent’s gun. It’s about ensuring that a person with an intention to do harm to others can’t access an assault weapon. A nation with weak gun laws is not a safe nation. Period. That’s why our work at Giffords continues on. Even while the NRA’s membership is declining amid scandal, they’re still a powerful force that we remain up against. It is going to take a lot for us to stand up to the power they hold over so many of our politicians, as well as their large sums of money. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you for standing with us, The Giffords Team ** Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: What do donations fund in the “off-year”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
You might wonder: It’s not an election year, so why fundraise?
#
We'll get right to the point, Peter:
Since winning the election last year, our online fundraising has slowed dramatically. A small slowdown is natural after a busy period like an election, but we're starting to get antsy that our numbers won't pick up in time to cover our operational costs.
Here's a screenshot directly from our ActBlue:
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230305.nDvoYu&refcode=em20230305-2269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2269%2E1082990%2EdWDDL0)
**What does a campaign do in the off-year?** Great question. Much of what we do during the “off-year” lays the groundwork for success during an election year. For Cori that means:
* **Amplifying her legislative work in Congress.**
* **Combating attacks from far right extremists** and media outlets like Fox News
* **Educating the public about her policies in ways that are accessible** , like how a Green New Deal for Cities could impact their town, or how the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ impacts their access to health care.
* **Ensuring Cori has a strong presence in her community** , and much more.

**These efforts create a strong foundation for victory during the Election Year — and we cannot miss opportunities by falling short now.** That's why we're hoping we can count on this grassroots movement to step up and help us make up the difference over the next few days.
**[Will you chip in $5 or more now to help us close the off-year fundraising gap?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230305.nDvoYu&refcode=em20230305-2269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2269%2E1082990%2EdWDDL0)**
**[Chip in $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230305.nDvoYu&refcode=em20230305-2269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2269%2E1082990%2EdWDDL0)**
**We believe our movement should be grounded in people — not special interests.** It's why Cori doesn't accept a cent from corporate PACs, and it's how she's able to fight for people-first solutions in Congress like Medicare for All and student debt cancellation.
But that means we rely 100% on grassroots donations of $5, $10, or $15 to power our movement to re-elect the first activist from the movement in defense of Black lives elected to federal office.
**[It's really important we receive enough contributions to stay on track with our projections and ensure we have the resources to keep Cori in Congress — chip in $5 today.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230305.nDvoYu&refcode=em20230305-2269&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2269%2E1082990%2EdWDDL0)**
Thank you,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230305?refcode=em20230305-2269-footer&t=23&refcode2=2269_1082990_dWDDL0&akid=2269%2E1082990%2EdWDDL0) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=24&akid=2269%2E1082990%2EdWDDL0)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2269%2E1082990%2EdWDDL0)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Housing that is affordable and homelessness, jobs and the economy, health care, climate change and our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Add your response to our March Issues Survey today
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1895%2E5257348%2EU-cq6s)
Derek, last night at CPAC, MAGA Republicans didn’t talk about their policies or big ideas to create a better future for our country. They spouted off a long list of grievances and conspiracies — and no one complained more bitterly than Donald Trump.
We’re building this campaign based on the priorities of Californians and the issues they’re facing every day:
* The high cost of housing and homelessness
* The need to make the economy work for everyone
* Climate change and our planet
* Our health
* And yes, our democracy

**[In a minute, I’ll explain a bit more about what each of these issues means, but first, can you take a moment to add your thoughts to our March Issues Survey and let me know which issues matter the most to you?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20230305-issues-survey.gIUfcK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230305_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=1895%2E5257348%2EU-cq6s)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20230305-issues-survey.gIUfcK&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20230305_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=1895%2E5257348%2EU-cq6s)
---
**To build more housing that is affordable,** we must reduce its cost, strengthen salaries and incomes so people can afford to live near where they work, and create new incentives for the development of housing, **like my bill to give favorable tax treatment to those who sell property to public housing agencies and nonprofits.**
**To protect our democracy,** we must expand voting rights for all by passing H.R. 1, the _For the People Act_ , and H.R. 4, the _John Lewis Voting Rights Act. And we need to get rid of the filibuster to do it._
We must also pass my legislation, the _Protecting Our Democracy Act_ , a landmark set of reforms that would enshrine our democratic guardrails into law. No longer a suggestion, but law. So that no future president can do what was once unthinkable, but Donald Trump made routine. We did it after Watergate, and it is high time that Congress does so once again.
**To combat the climate crisis,** we must pass the Green New Deal — legislation on which I am an original co-sponsor. The _Inflation Reduction Act_ was an important step forward. In fact, it was the largest climate investment in our nation’s history. But we must go much, much further, and create millions of green, new jobs.
**To build an economy that works for everyone,** we must make the wealthy pay their fair share in taxes, invest in childcare for middle class and working families, once again expand the Child Tax Credit, cancel student debt, improve unemployment insurance, and much more.
And finally, **we must pass Medicare for All.** Health care is a right — not a privilege. And in the richest nation in the world, we must have universal health care. The pandemic exposed so many vulnerabilities within our health system. We need to lower the cost of health care and prescription drugs.
**[What do you think, Derek? clean_body: | Add your response to our March Issues Survey today Derek, last night at CPAC, MAGA Republicans didn’t talk about their policies or big ideas to create a better future for our country. They spouted off a long list of grievances and conspiracies — and no one complained more bitterly than Donald Trump. We’re building this campaign based on the priorities of Californians and the issues they’re facing every day: The high cost of housing and homelessness The need to make the economy work for everyone Climate change and our planet Our health And yes, our democracy To build more housing that is affordable, we must reduce its cost, strengthen salaries and incomes so people can afford to live near where they work, and create new incentives for the development of housing, like my bill to give favorable tax treatment to those who sell property to public housing agencies and nonprofits. To protect our democracy, we must expand voting rights for all by passing H.R. 1, the For the People Act , and H.R. 4, the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. And we need to get rid of the filibuster to do it. We must also pass my legislation, the Protecting Our Democracy Act , a landmark set of reforms that would enshrine our democratic guardrails into law. No longer a suggestion, but law. So that no future president can do what was once unthinkable, but Donald Trump made routine. We did it after Watergate, and it is high time that Congress does so once again. To combat the climate crisis, we must pass the Green New Deal — legislation on which I am an original co-sponsor. The Inflation Reduction Act was an important step forward. In fact, it was the largest climate investment in our nation’s history. But we must go much, much further, and create millions of green, new jobs. To build an economy that works for everyone, we must make the wealthy pay their fair share in taxes, invest in childcare for middle class and working families, once again expand the Child Tax Credit, cancel student debt, improve unemployment insurance, and much more. And finally, we must pass Medicare for All. Health care is a right — not a privilege. And in the richest nation in the world, we must have universal health care. The pandemic exposed so many vulnerabilities within our health system. We need to lower the cost of health care and prescription drugs. — Adam | | 150 E. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert‘s almost lost her congressional seat last year, because even her lean-red district had a hard time with her unhinged ranting. Let's turn Frisch's strong run in '22 into a win in '24–send Boebert off somewhere to talk to herself and take back Kevin McCarthy's gavel.
body:
Adam Frisch for Colorado
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdd6953ec-976f-4de1-9a68-17bc7ad39766/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Lauren Boebert just keeps talking. And talking. And talking some more. It's like she has a disease where she simply can't stop her unhinged ranting.** **_In recent days she's openly rooted for Russia vs Ukraine, attacked Discover Card for tracking gun purchases to prevent gun violence as a Communist plot and sponsored a bill to get rid of the Department of Education._** [**_Will you join us in giving Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to replace this loud-mouth fool with a results-oriented, liberal-minded fighter in Frisch?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc849d73e-ba35-4de0-aa5a-30396af73cfc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Look. If Boebert wants to go shooting her mouth off for the rest of her miserable life, I don't care. That she is doing it while getting paid six figures with our taxpayer dollars and using the microphone given to her to put more Americans and human beings around the world in danger, that I have a serious problem with._
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc640996-63af-485c-83e9-ef65af2f3714/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Meanwhile, the accomplished Adam Frisch, who lost to this loud and stupid person by only 546 votes in a lean Trump district in 2022, is running again. Instead of the verbal diarrhea of Boebert, here is an example of the kinds of things to which Frisch is talking about:_ **_Let's turn Frisch's strong run in '22 into a win in '24–send Boebert off somewhere to talk to herself and take back Kevin McCarthy's gavel._** [**_Will you join us in giving Adam Frisch $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to replace this loud-mouth fool with a results-oriented, liberal-minded fighter in Frisch?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b637872-770f-4146-9f04-d1b145d8f649/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for your dedication. Always.** Cliff

513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| | |

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te861ef18-9ef3-4a5b-99e3-b5ad028ff759/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

| | | Did you know the average cable/satellite subscriber pays $20 a year for Fox News -- even if nobody in their household watches it? [Add your name: Tell your cable company to stop making you pay for Fox News](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3d7c965-7619-4561-9b11-866c4c03f941/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This comes from "carriage" fees paid to Fox by the companies, and passed on the their customers. **And it adds up to $1.8 billion a year for Fox.** Fox News is not a news company. They knowingly broadcast lies. And there is no reason that people smart enough to not watch it should still have to pay for it. name: Vice President Mike Pence
subject: I’m taking direct action to defend the police
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394723:6t6xZJGSN:m:1:3331421248:0878668CA7B299BDC372B165AA4B3C8F:r)
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394723:6t6xZJGSN:m:1:3331421248:0878668CA7B299BDC372B165AA4B3C8F:r)
---

**It 's Vice President Mike Pence, Peter, and I've had enough with the radical "defund the police" movement. **

The woke mainstream media and leftist organizations that prey on the demise of our officers are dismantling the safety of our communities. The good news is that I am taking direct action against the uproar of the anti-police movement.

This week I'll be speaking with Chief Reggie Burres in North Charleston, SC. The **[back the blue movement](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394724:6t6xZJGSN:m:1:3331421248:0878668CA7B299BDC372B165AA4B3C8F:r "back the blue movement")** starts with meeting police chiefs nationwide and this week I start that dialogue.

**[Join my team, Advancing American Freedom, and help us back the blue by chipping in any amount TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394723:6t6xZJGSN:m:1:3331421248:0878668CA7B299BDC372B165AA4B3C8F:r "Peter, join
my team, Advancing American Freedom, and help us back the blue by chipping in any amount TODAY!")**

---
| | [JOIN AAF >> BACK THE BLUE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394723:6t6xZJGSN:m:1:3331421248:0878668CA7B299BDC372B165AA4B3C8F:r)
---

Thank you for joining the fight,
_Vice President Mike Pence_

name: American Action News

Hey -

Thought you’d want to know...

Due to an **accidental overstock** in their warehouse...

My friends are doing a “Last Minute Giveaway” and **[giving out their extremely popular Mil Spec Tactical Watches FREE today.](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11761/6374453/6671ba0af90675c4143b6d6bcf63f9b662c586a1/c2bb19a3adcc5d8bdcd51b3ada5afa4af879668d)**

Normally these sell for USD99...

But today, they’re handing out 100 of them at no-cost to clear space for new inventory.

This watch is the ** _perfect “everyday carry”..._**

\- Water and impact resistant \- Built-in, 3-meter “lifeline band” of paracord \- Emergency whistle \- Foolproof and durable compass \- Ambient temperature gauge
Like I said, they’re **available FREE today** – until their overstock is cleared out.

That could happen any time though.

And I’m told there are ** _only 100 left_** to give out.

So don’t dilly dally.

**[Click here to get your FREE Mil Spec Tactical Watch](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11761/6374453/6671ba0af90675c4143b6d6bcf63f9b662c586a1/c2bb19a3adcc5d8bdcd51b3ada5afa4af879668d)** – before someone else does.

name: VoteVets
subject: MTG
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Just the dumbest thing to say
#
Hey there, Derek.
CPAC, the Conservative Political Action Conference, wrapped up yesterday. For the most part, it was your typical Trump Fest.
But one thing in particular stood out to us. Marjorie Taylor Greene went after President Zelensky in Ukraine. Here’s what she said:
_“No money to Ukraine, and that country needs to find peace, not war... And while I will look at a camera and directly tell Zelensky: you’d better leave your hands off of our sons and daughters because they’re not dying over there.”_
If that isn’t just the dumbest thing to say.
Put aside the fact that for a tiny fraction of the defense budget, we’ve been able to marginalize Putin and his military threat while uniting NATO and our European allies.
Put aside the fact that Ukraine didn’t start this war — that this democratic country was invaded, and continues to be under siege.
The thing that REALLY bugs us is this: Every single day that Ukraine fights on is a day that American sons and daughters are NOT in harm’s way. The most important thing for our National Security in this conflict is to make sure Zelensky and Ukraine have everything they need to take back their territory and beat Putin once and for all.
If they don't, Putin will march on, and the United States will be drawn into a disastrous war in Europe. It is MTG who is backing a policy that ends with our sons and daughters in harm's way.
MTG is the last person we should be hearing from on this. But as it stands, she is one of the loudest voices in the Republican Party.
That’s where we come in.
**[If you're able, chip in $3 today and help us continue our work — backing Veteran candidates who run and WIN in tough races all over the country. Candidates who will fight back against people like MTG.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.Xt_ByJ&refcode=em230305-1-15&t=1&akid=7767%2E3013755%2EA84OBf)

We can all agree on one thing here: We could use a lot fewer people like MTG in Congress. With your help, we’ll turn the tide.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: The Mamas’ Caucus centers mothers in the policies we champion in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Join me in the fight for mothers and working-class families across our country. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvaFwBm10zvYn7qlM0AuaPJVey4gHti2ZjJZMQrhkmTceJFUq0E5VoHoHe7JX7MntNsQrHsT7cgLPgFnFAoT_5qynTXXD9x3qXwMIV8-fWvoM9j6Vwo8kQbXZRqXPJmFNP0Of8FteElGOqtHrMHfHxcKTTzhHk6z_fHKpwb0YHSZ8UqFFQTKp5aN4ewr6C7bQYlFM35sqDX6lv-5tu4s7dlQEeSCbMZFSfq3iljeaQrl4_y2wJKUwyaIC4gR2VheiE/3u8/4bPVlxy6ThO_hz02Wy5-sw/h0/yGJz-L8dHOYoohJKzM3XZkhWM1Bim7iOJkUk4ugfg_8)
---
Friend, This Women’s History Month, I want to center women of color. I founded the Mamas’ Caucus in Congress -- in partnership with Mothering Justice -- to center and advocate for mothers of color and their families. Mothers of color face unjust maternal and infant health disparities along with economic disparities, and are leaders in the fight for reproductive justice and policies such as affordable childcare, paid leave, and to reduce poverty. These are the bold policies that working-class families need and deserve. One of the bills I’m fighting for is the _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would provide families with close to $400/month payment per child -- cutting deep child poverty by 70%. Children would be automatically enrolled at birth when they apply for their Social Security Number, so there would be no need for annual paperwork, and the program would include the lowest wealth families who are currently left out of the tax credit system. I’ve been committed to supporting families for a long time, including back when I was a state legislator. For example, after my own lived experience of breastfeeding while on the Michigan House floor, I introduced legislation to ban discrimination against women who breastfeed in public. [**I’m committed to making bold changes that mothers of color and working-class families deserve. Friend,
This Women’s History Month, I want to recognize how women in our country still face numerous challenges, including the persistent wage gap, the fight for our reproductive rights, and intimate partner violence.
Our feminism must be intersectional, and that means recognizing and centering women who face oppression in multiple ways. For example, Black women face unjust disparities in maternal and infant health, particularly in my state of Michigan.
As a mama myself, I refuse to accept the status quo where our systems keep failing my Black neighbors and other marginalized communities.
So I co-founded and co-chair the Mamas' Caucus in Congress. In collaboration with the Black-led grassroots group Mothering Justice, we’re committed to advocating for mothers of color and their families.
The Mamas’ Caucus centers mothers of color in the policies we champion in Congress, including affordable childcare, national paid sick leave and family leave, closing the racial and gender wealth gap, and reproductive justice.

I’m also proud to be a founding member of the newly launched Congressional Dads’ Caucus, because all parents deserve a national paid family and medical leave program, affordable childcare, and policies that reduce poverty like reinstating the expanded Child Tax Credit.
The expanded Child Tax Credit cut child poverty by nearly half, but corporate Democrats and Republicans let it expire.
So I introduced the _End Child Poverty Act_ , which would provide families with close to $400/month per child, cutting deep child poverty by 70%. Children would be automatically enrolled at birth when they apply for their Social Security Number, so there would be no need for annual paperwork, and the program would include the lowest wealth families who are currently left out of the tax credit system.
We need to invest in working-class families by ensuring they have the resources they need, including by putting money directly in people’s pockets.

clean_body: Join me in the fight for mothers and working-class families across our country. | | | Friend, This Women’s History Month, I want to center women of color. I founded the Mamas’ Caucus in Congress -- in partnership with Mothering Justice -- to center and advocate for mothers of color and their families. Mothers of color face unjust maternal and infant health disparities along with economic disparities, and are leaders in the fight for reproductive justice and policies such as affordable childcare, paid leave, and to reduce poverty. These are the bold policies that working-class families need and deserve. One of the bills I’m fighting for is the End Child Poverty Act , which would provide families with close to $400/month payment per child -- cutting deep child poverty by 70%. Children would be automatically enrolled at birth when they apply for their Social Security Number, so there would be no need for annual paperwork, and the program would include the lowest wealth families who are currently left out of the tax credit system. I’ve been committed to supporting families for a long time, including back when I was a state legislator. For example, after my own lived experience of breastfeeding while on the Michigan House floor, I introduced legislation to ban discrimination against women who breastfeed in public. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. Please feel free to check out yesterday’s email for more information. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Mar 3, 2023 Subject: The Mamas’ Caucus centers mothers in the policies we champion in Congress To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This Women’s History Month, I want to recognize how women in our country still face numerous challenges, including the persistent wage gap, the fight for our reproductive rights, and intimate partner violence. Our feminism must be intersectional, and that means recognizing and centering women who face oppression in multiple ways. For example, Black women face unjust disparities in maternal and infant health, particularly in my state of Michigan. As a mama myself, I refuse to accept the status quo where our systems keep failing my Black neighbors and other marginalized communities. So I co-founded and co-chair the Mamas' Caucus in Congress. In collaboration with the Black-led grassroots group Mothering Justice, we’re committed to advocating for mothers of color and their families. The Mamas’ Caucus centers mothers of color in the policies we champion in Congress, including affordable childcare, national paid sick leave and family leave, closing the racial and gender wealth gap, and reproductive justice. I’m also proud to be a founding member of the newly launched Congressional Dads’ Caucus, because all parents deserve a national paid family and medical leave program, affordable childcare, and policies that reduce poverty like reinstating the expanded Child Tax Credit. The expanded Child Tax Credit cut child poverty by nearly half, but corporate Democrats and Republicans let it expire. So I introduced the End Child Poverty Act , which would provide families with close to $400/month per child, cutting deep child poverty by 70%. Children would be automatically enrolled at birth when they apply for their Social Security Number, so there would be no need for annual paperwork, and the program would include the lowest wealth families who are currently left out of the tax credit system. We need to invest in working-class families by ensuring they have the resources they need, including by putting money directly in people’s pockets. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you. I will continue to advocate on behalf of parents and women, including trans women, many of whom are mothers and who face additional hurdles. With escalating anti-trans policies in the U.S., it’s more important than ever to fight for LGBTQI+ rights and gender justice for all. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | | | Peter,
---
| | Democrat priorities are completely out of whack.

They want to spend _trillions_ growing the federal government, funding their green new deal priorities, and pushing woke education in our schools.

And just last week, they proposed a bill to _**slash the defense budget by $100 BILLION.**_

**The far Left has made themselves clear, Peter. They want to make America weak.**

**We MUST stop socialist Democrats from decimating our national defense, and we need your help.[Join us today and stand by our military to KEEP AMERICA STRONG!](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=378828b49daf49b99fe471626927078c&_e=uqxUjZM6y1bdehV7sowkNSFeXflConujckZWpko5SJm-e4gdKNuNMjJv9sR53nS55S6hM2SrUUffZU2QSA8AeJ3AI5w0Io7mX5-GeNHBmrREiaXf0Y9SF2Su9uUZqW3Egp-1SJLRQck9PS_WZLs-9Q5U3KZQt2J6uwrdjcExTKC4ZWB8jG4D2NXMCrt5_KYlUpa_pEcaWnsG7T2RyHn12hMoOg2sndv3wibjqkQe7PvPKwiH9J4Qxx-mXTlhmU0eQvrn604hSEskNplptnncX9BSGAfypSzhuys413v3hy93LEcmd4qTQ_mHSLd_ZCc92dpK4Owns-8l2UkXgpcD6iRhmPXcs_CmJ4Zlk5AqhY6DNUMFK3mzYPZzXekpuZQH)**

Democrats are trying to decimate our military from the inside out.

From drastic budget cuts to critical race theory at our service academies, they’re dividing our troops and stripping them of valuable resources they need to keep America safe.

**It says it right there in the Constitution, Peter: it’s the role of the federal government to establish and maintain a military.**

But we should note that it says NOTHING about policing values, indoctrinating our schools, and Green New Deals.

Hey Team - it's Betsy, Nikki Haley's campaign manager. It's been a little over two weeks since Nikki launched her presidential campaign, so I wanted to take a moment to give you some insight on what we've seen on the ground so far.

**FIRST:** **THOUSANDS** of people showed up at her launch in historic Charleston, SC.

**THEN:** Nikki hit the road to New Hampshire & Iowa. Her events were **PACKED** with standing room only.

**NOW:** The momentum we are feeling on the ground has made it clear that Americans are ready for a new generation of leadership to fight Joe Biden's socialism and national self-loathing.
**[Take a look a look for yourself:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393299:J6vwtJGNs:m:1:3365131770:074254E70FF4E47F3968EBCC5CBF3272:r "Take a look a look for yourself:")**

Let's save America together, Peter!

Betsy

Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She's served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America's ambassador to the United Nations...and she's a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country.

Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people.

**[In order to build momentum and get Nikki's message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki's team and pitch in a donation today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62393297:J6vwtJGNs:m:1:3365131770:074254E70FF4E47F3968EBCC5CBF3272:r "In order to
build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today? ")**

Thank you in advance for your support.

Thank you,

Team Haley

P.S. If you don't have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today.

clean_body: There is still work to be done. | | | | | Hey Team - it's Betsy, Nikki Haley's campaign manager. It's been a little over two weeks since Nikki launched her presidential campaign, so I wanted to take a moment to give you some insight on what we've seen on the ground so far. FIRST: THOUSANDS of people showed up at her launch in historic Charleston, SC. THEN: Nikki hit the road to New Hampshire & Iowa. Her events were PACKED with standing room only. NOW: The momentum we are feeling on the ground has made it clear that Americans are ready for a new generation of leadership to fight Joe Biden's socialism and national self-loathing. "Take a look a look for yourself:" | Nikki will be traveling across the country until her message reaches ALL Americans. BUT, in order to do that, we need the continued support from grassroots patriots like you. | | _“The recent discovery that certain human trafficking hotline tips are delayed is incredibly problematic. Human trafficking can affect anyone, anywhere, at any phase in life. That’s why the National Human Trafficking Hotline is so important and funded by Congress. To fight back against human trafficking, we need timely information. Congress should take immediate action to fix this critical resource.” _ **– Attorney General Miyares** Since the beginning of his administration, Attorney General Miyares has been dedicated to combating human trafficking in Virginia. He has supported bipartisan legislation to increase human trafficking awareness by requiring training courses for law enforcement, hotel employees, and first year students at Virginia public universities, as well as launching the National Child I.D. Program in Virginia and being an active participant in the Hampton Roads Human Trafficking Task Force.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | “The recent discovery that certain human trafficking hotline tips are delayed is incredibly problematic. Human trafficking can affect anyone, anywhere, at any phase in life. That’s why the National Human Trafficking Hotline is so important and funded by Congress. To fight back against human trafficking, we need timely information. Congress should take immediate action to fix this critical resource.” – Attorney General Miyares Since the beginning of his administration, Attorney General Miyares has been dedicated to combating human trafficking in Virginia. He has supported bipartisan legislation to increase human trafficking awareness by requiring training courses for law enforcement, hotel employees, and first year students at Virginia public universities, as well as launching the National Child I.D. Program in Virginia and being an active participant in the Hampton Roads Human Trafficking Task Force. | | Bedford GOP | | Thank you for the warm welcome! Attorney General Miyares hopes to be back again soon. Bedford Area Chamber Attorney General Miyares also enjoyed meeting with members of the Bedford Area Chamber of Commerce. | | | | Roanoke Chamber Attorney General Miyares also got to meet with members of the Roanoke Chamber of Commerce. Smyth-Wythe Chamber | | | | | Thank you to our business leaders for all of the opportunities you help to provide in your communities! Hampton University Attorney General Miyares was honored to meet the new President of Hampton University, Darrell K. Williams, and some student leaders this week. Lt. General (ret.) Williams brings a wealth of leadership experience, and AG Miyares is confident that he will continue to take Hampton in the right direction. Norfolk State Attorney General Miyares was pleased to be on Norfolk State University’s campus again this week. AG Miyares discussed his Office’s Oliver Hill Externship Program, which exposes HBCU students to the field of law. Hello,
In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert.
Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.”
Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes!
In the end, though, the race went to a recount. **Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country.**
Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he _listened_.
Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. **Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you?**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you chip in $5 or more right now to Adam’s campaign and help him defeat Lauren Boebert? We were outspent in 2022 and just barely lost. clean_body: In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! Hello, In 2022, no one gave my husband Adam Frisch a chance against Lauren Boebert. Everywhere you looked, the political pundits were calling Colorado’s 3rd congressional district “Safe Republican” or “Solid R.” Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight only gave Adam a 3% chance of defeating Boebert. They projected he’d lose by over 45,000 votes! In the end, though, the race went to a recount. Lauren Boebert won by just 546 votes, and Adam lost the closest race in the entire country. Because here’s what their “models” and “forecasts” didn’t factor in: Adam put in the work. He traveled 24,000 miles in our red pickup truck to every corner of the district. He met thousands and thousands of voters – and he listened. Now, my husband’s running again, and I’ll be honest: The first campaign was hard. But defeating Lauren Boebert is just too important to sit this out. Adam’s all-in to finish the job in 2024. I’m all-in. Can we count on you? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = This is a journey we’re making again because so many people like you reached out and encouraged Adam to run one more time. I know it means a lot to Adam that you have his back. Thank you, Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

They’re doing everything they can to buy this seat and kick me out of the Senate because they know our movement is a threat to their million-dollar careers and cushy place of influence. But I don’t care what they think of me, Peter. I only answer to one group: hardworking patriots like you. The fight for 2024 is well underway, and we can’t fall behind before we’ve even truly gotten started. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

DeSantis has gone too far this time...
| **_BREAKING from THE NEW YORK TIMES:_
"DeSantis Wants to ROLL BACK Press Freedom"** [](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20230305_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=1707%2E564421%2EVM4Klv) We're boiling with rage at Ron DeSantis right now.

**The NYT just reported that DeSantis is going all-out DICTATOR in his attempt to destroy the Freedom of the Press.**

He wants to sue, bankrupt, and jail reporters who fight against him!

Listen, DeSantis is praying that good people like you don't take action to stop him.

[Our team has been fighting DeSantis since DAY ONE, and now we're launching a brand new petition to show public anger against his plot. We need to see 10,000 signatures to defend the press by 10:00 P.M. or else DeSantis will become a full-blown dictator!!](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20230305_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1707%2E564421%2EVM4Klv) | [SIGN IMMEDIATELY: ADD YOUR NAME TO STAND WITH THE PRESS AGAINST RON DESANTIS »](https://act.ronbegone.com/signup/PET20230215_FreePress?refcode=RBG_20230305_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1707%2E564421%2EVM4Klv)
---
We know you're busy... but please, take a moment to read these key excerpts from the article:
"Over the course of an hour, Mr. DeSantis and his guests laid out a detailed case for **revisiting a landmark Supreme Court decision protecting the press from defamation lawsuits**."

"The decision set a higher bar for defamation lawsuits involving public figures, and for years it was viewed as sacrosanct. **That standard has empowered journalists to investigate and criticize public figures without fear that an unintentional error will result in crippling financial penalties.** "

"Mr. DeSantis, a likely Republican presidential candidate, **put the effort at the center of his war against the mainstream media.** "

"**Two justices on the conservative-majority Supreme Court, Clarence Thomas and Neil M. Gorsuch, have indicated their willingness to roll back the ruling** in written dissents in recent years..."
---
As you can see, this situation is becoming more dire by the day – the MAGA Supreme Court could be ready to back DeSantis!!

body:
| I’ve got some bad news:

In the dead of night, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party did what they’ve threatened for the last two years.

**They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.**

This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters.

Peter, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people.

[**Please, contribute $10, 25, or whatever you can spare today split between my campaign and Mark Takano to help me respond to Republicans’ baseless attacks on me. This isn’t the end of our fight for truth, accountability, and our democracy. name: Our Revolution
subject: electing a progressive mayor in Chicago!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, all eyes are
on Chicago after progressive Brandon Johnson advanced to the runoff for
mayor — and we’re uniting our movement to help him win!

As a former public school teacher, union organizer, and county
commissioner, Brandon knows the pain caused by disinvestment in education,
infrastructure, and health care — and the violence left in its wake.

His opponent? Conservative Paul Vallas, a public school privatizer who
calls himself “more of a Republican than a Democrat” — and he has the
backing of rightwing mega-donors to prove it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230303_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1008&akid=4081%2E5885482%2E2DKoCc ]Brandon Johnson can win this race with our help! Chip in now to
mobilize nearly 100,000 Our Revolution members in Chicago and make 250,000
voter contacts ahead of Election Day April 4!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230303_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1009&akid=4081%2E5885482%2E2DKoCc ][IMG]

This election will impact the lives of millions and reverberate
nationwide. Our movement has worked for years to build power in Chicago,
and we’re so close to electing a progressive mayor!

Brandon Johnson champions affordable housing, good-paying jobs, taxing the
ultra rich, criminal justice reform, and more. “These are things that are
not extreme or radical ideas,” he told the Chicago Sun Times.

On a people-centered agenda, Brandon bested incumbent Lori Lightfoot,
making her a one-term mayor, and it’s through a people-powered campaign
that he can defeat Vallas in the runoff.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8411?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230303_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1010&akid=4081%2E5885482%2E2DKoCc ]We have the momentum. Let’s do everything we can to elect Brandon
Johnson to Mayor of Chicago! Pitch in now to power our voter outreach to
more than a quarter-million voter contacts in the city.

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230303_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1001&akid=4081%2E5885482%2E2DKoCc ]Support Our Revolution →

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1002&akid=4081%2E5885482%2E2DKoCc ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1003&akid=4081%2E5885482%2E2DKoCc ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1004&akid=4081%2E5885482%2E2DKoCc ][IMG]

Our Revolution is a national grassroots network of local groups dedicated
to organizing a political revolution powerful enough to challenge the
structural forces that threaten our survival as a society. From city halls
to the halls of Congress, our movement is fighting to win progressive
issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic party
and get big money out of politics. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230303_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1005&akid=4081%2E5885482%2E2DKoCc ]Help us achieve these goals by
donating today.

Join our movement by [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1006&akid=4081%2E5885482%2E2DKoCc ]following us on Facebook and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/738?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230303_FR_Chicago_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Mayor&t=1007&akid=4081%2E5885482%2E2DKoCc ]signing up here.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=4081%2E5885482%2E2DKoCc

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: What we're fighting against: the GOP and its enablers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
This is a big moment for our movement. I've been leading Congressional Democrats in a fight to deliver the core of our progressive agenda — **an agenda that puts the people first.** We're fighting for a future that isn't controlled by insurrection-supporting, election-denying Republicans, fossil fuel lobbyists, Big Pharma, and corporate America.
Our side has grassroots energy, strength, and resolve. **The other side has unlimited amounts of money to dump into attack ads to influence policy and elections.** We have the people _and_ the power to fight for a Democratic agenda that invests in working people, families, and our communities. But only if we keep proving the power of our progressive movement by showing up at every fight for the next two years.
This goes far beyond just the cancellation of this crushing debt that has become a burden to millions across the country: This is about freedom, economic security, and uplifting the futures and lives of working people.
[**So Peter, will you chip in $3 to help our movement maintain our momentum this cycle? Let's show corporate America and the GOP's special interest groups who has the real power.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39658?refcode=em20230305-2239&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2239%2E420207%2Eyu4Yjz)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39658?refcode=em20230305-2239&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2239%2E420207%2Eyu4Yjz)**
Historic investments in climate and infrastructure, lowering healthcare costs, major gun reform, millions of new jobs, expanding care for veterans, and more.
Democrats did that in just 2 years — and we were just getting started. There's no denying that we're up against new challenges now with a Republican majority hell-bent on stripping away our progress. **But I know what we're capable of, and I won't stop fighting. I need you with me, Peter.**
We need to show the GOP and their corporate and billionaire buddies that we won't back down. [**Can you chip in to show everyone that our movement remains strong?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39658?refcode=em20230305-2239&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2239%2E420207%2Eyu4Yjz)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/39658?refcode=em20230305-2239&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2239%2E420207%2Eyu4Yjz)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230305-2239-footer&t=23&refcode2=2239_420207_yu4Yjz&akid=2239%2E420207%2Eyu4Yjz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2239%2E420207%2Eyu4Yjz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2239%2E420207%2Eyu4Yjz)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

If we don't act now, we risk losing the critical Senate seat in Texas, and with it, our ability to advance conservative policies and defend our values.
That's why it's so important that you **[chip in $25 or more immediately to support Ted Cruz and help reclaim the Senate Majority.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62394781:61ZE_JGND:m:1:3331421248:8DB773083C788106F92A0E5567A8F738:r)**

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: What you need to know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
[**_Peter, I know I’ve been emailing you a lot this week, so I’ll keep this quick: Can you rush $14 right now to help Democrats take back the House? I can’t tell you how much your support means to me. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59716005/394898506/-1810142053?refcode=20230305_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2ZmM2Q0Zi05MGJiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egtCTT4RPxMwnxSHbyYUbLvunrUC30_L0OyV1cxz-sE=) I need you to know three critical things, Peter:
1. Democrats need to flip just FIVE seats to reclaim the House Majority.
2. Polls show this election will be a neck-and-neck race for control of Congress.
3. Now that extreme Republicans know how close we are to victory, far-right special interests just sent them $12 million at a high-dollar fundraiser to try to save their Majority.

[**_I’ll be honest, Peter: All of our historic progress will be destroyed if we allow Trump and his Republicans to retake power. That’s why I’m asking every single supporter of mine to chip in just $14 before midnight to ensure we take back the House. Can I count on you? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59716008/394898509/-1810142053?refcode=20230305_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2ZmM2Q0Zi05MGJiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egtCTT4RPxMwnxSHbyYUbLvunrUC30_L0OyV1cxz-sE=) | | ****[Chip in $14 immediately>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59716012/394898512/-1810142053?refcode=20230305_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2ZmM2Q0Zi05MGJiLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=egtCTT4RPxMwnxSHbyYUbLvunrUC30_L0OyV1cxz-sE=)****

| | |

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59717286/394900150/1983311359?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2293-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZTFkNzAxLTkxYmItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5M5iH6avqmVreif7o8yq3RsnaYP-eWjNCeDSIIe33uY=)
Friend, I've been in politics for a LONG time, and I thought I'd seen everything under the sun – _but boy, was I WRONG_.

**The sh*t the GOP comes up with is cuckoo! **

Republicans will do ANYTHING to gain power and enact their destructive agenda – even if it means attacking our country and their own party. It took 15 votes to confirm the leader of their own party!
**And just consider the insanity being proposed by the GOP: **
* **A national ban on abortion **and the end of reproductive freedom in America.

* **Cuts to Social Security, Medicare **and other programs American families rely on.

* Stripping back voting rights and undermining faith in our elections – with the ultimate goal of **destroying our democracy for their political gain.**

I won't mince words. The GOP we know today is not just wrong, problematic, or foolish. _It is_ __ _ dangerous_.**And for that, every member of the GOP must be held accountable.**

That's why I work with American Bridge. Our mission is to hold Republicans, including Donald Trump and his allies, accountable by keeping track of the dangerous, destructive things Republicans say and do and to make sure voters don't forget it.

**[I don't have to tell a top Democrat like you how vital our work is. Please help me and my team raise $10,000 by midnight by rushing $15 or more to American Bridge today so we can hold Republicans accountable and ensure the future of our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59717287/394900151/1983311359?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2293-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZTFkNzAxLTkxYmItZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5M5iH6avqmVreif7o8yq3RsnaYP-eWjNCeDSIIe33uY=)**

clean_body: President Obama is calling on YOU, to rejoin this fight and recommit yourself to state Democrats! | | | | | We just re-launched our Official 2023 DLCC Membership Cards due to popular demand, and now President Obama is calling on YOU, to renew your commitment to state Democrats! President Obama is so right! Grassroots Democrats are at the very heart of our work – without each and every one of you, we couldn’t have made history last November. But we have our work cut out for us as we face off against MAGA extremists in special elections in a few weeks. That’s why we need you to become an official 2023 DLCC member today. Your membership contribution helps you own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to win. As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of our fight to expand Democratic power at the state level, defeat Republican extremists, and elect Democrats who will build a better future for everyone, not just their wealthy donors. But this is only possible when supporters like you step up and become members! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We can’t wait to see your name on our March membership list! | | **West Virginia Misses President Trump: An Opinion Piece by Attorney General Morrisey**
---
Earlier this month, West Virginia Attorney General Patrick Morrisey wrote an article calling for an apology from President Biden. In his piece the Attorney General touches on how West Virginia sorely misses President Trump as he paved a path for our country toward global resilience and local revitalization.
---
[](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=6e8bce109747433d87f7518e72aa2ae2&_e=Cl_s9xHY-xBGINkKnXYwHmg-FJRZzGy93ZVpdV1Fag6bCTwM1V6PYY5HiQFSsmVq1p12FDk9A8Ss8y2yKj6dXsy9idkIf8KMhcPYdmCnA9FKPBpa40UpUqu39YKSsFnq7enZeENx-pKfXjvAFknIyHvXUz3nGEcBpnJ6hbmz-sS7iH1aX-PsZsRlhbaUv4izwqeFWi32U7B_RMozR_uLgDyWvi_MujAjUdid2q-MGW7LtfkZAKOF7Nft1z8O6NB-bPqK2RHtjyfD0TfoVFuoJg%3D%3D)

**Attorney General Patrick Morrisey suing over ATF pistol brace rule**
---
[](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=6e8bce109747433d87f7518e72aa2ae2&_e=Cl_s9xHY-xBGINkKnXYwHsJi5UsAABHbNw3BhOs_FpUo8GBWzqxN5PdiC64e4tQs2rS_CzO9fW0YHKZmzMlX7sdk6-YMKOVjlWpNYdppICOyPdfrXkgOaZpIvZBbf3CY_MaqX5RhNGXQrT3J62HpC7vEG366oQXoQP4vf47mi3a6-GI-4EjtWEwejxNq7jlYz58rC8q7iURQyTRag-stKOC34i1AiWAtMrmdtcMDGRt39UTKXYrrDspV1NJZ39IUfPQYQjF2S5VPqorvE46VeLqh88yQEkCqggzW3limg66A2jT2HhzLfdtZhy71Fl6W3Tx-QRs_bzMw_lRuNY9qscn5gbDspLTqGouhDoPRvu8%3D)
---
As a proud defender of our Second Amendment rights, AG Morrisey is rallying other attorneys general and leading the charge in a lawsuit against the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF), following the implementation of a new rule regulating pistol braces.
---
[Watch the Video](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=6e8bce109747433d87f7518e72aa2ae2&_e=Cl_s9xHY-xBGINkKnXYwHsJi5UsAABHbNw3BhOs_FpUo8GBWzqxN5PdiC64e4tQs2rS_CzO9fW0YHKZmzMlX7sdk6-YMKOVjlWpNYdppICOyPdfrXkgOaZpIvZBbf3CY_MaqX5RhNGXQrT3J62HpC7vEG366oQXoQP4vf47mi3a6-GI-4EjtWEwejxNq7jlYz58rC8q7iURQyTRag-stKGVadB6RQY8mzscnTUMaNrEZi0J7ED_mGf04ubCl1PMbJlupbsP8NFA90jtJl9dp5rjhNJAeuAZYtwNWE9SOYMSlo7wAemMI80kBZp0cw-_EAk6vhZKOgRDsRUnVnY4yucG5tq1xNtfdb4EIMKLT03k%3D)

**Morrisey Discusses Plans for 2024 Election Cycle**
---
[](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=6e8bce109747433d87f7518e72aa2ae2&_e=Cl_s9xHY-xBGINkKnXYwHr2R2AWbg1R4QbQ4-xnN_IBr0_bUWW1qDvgaDNq0CTMLw1zkFnn8I7ygOeT2MnYo_k81TUhn2m8vIbXTKyPpkUMxUBLF-_EI3C8_W8quXoZ-qUWEsOnGQQprv0mTEPI8_6kpZ0tf83XUdAfgmxOZAz9aYi3ZcOywZKHn_D-zR3RTyEUtSYmTqC6YYVj557hQFE0hUqIVcLild1pPL1qN2TyLvfjYCclK5uOIzCR-czwT)
---
The Attorney General joined Hoppy Kercheval in an interview to discuss his plans for the upcoming 2024 election cycle. While the Attorney General isn’t fully prepared to make a campaign announcement, he does mention that there are options on the table for the next steps in his political career, and that an announcement will be made in the coming months.
---
[Listen to the Interview Here](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=6e8bce109747433d87f7518e72aa2ae2&_e=Cl_s9xHY-xBGINkKnXYwHr2R2AWbg1R4QbQ4-xnN_IBr0_bUWW1qDvgaDNq0CTMLw1zkFnn8I7ygOeT2MnYo_k81TUhn2m8vIbXTKyPpkUNPdQAYZSqlShs4-lujfpVTk192eYy9BRlFUIU4DP_CIMuwLfq2eL6uNbETT1nXESSJ8ynaCK2HeY2tIESciwnMZCo3GDo7pZi7X935Kzxktke_VfNHA4TAq0X13lhxVnOHx29577DNLpbhyFpvLKrd)

| | **Attorney General Morrisey Calls for Biden to Designate Mexican Drug Cartels as Terrorist Organizations**
---
[](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=6e8bce109747433d87f7518e72aa2ae2&_e=Cl_s9xHY-xBGINkKnXYwHtkV3Z79BTYc8V-UKYxOoZSPzn6UG4Jr83Dh9LA3RQDOluNQrfpweyIuICwtjZ6_BC80kdP2YR-g12bQ_E-Xo1_6pE8ECBL1dlmiHLz9ZlKNhZ7nPtDO8QgkTiUJ9ed-5GWB6bfaby4F7WYrxb5FJd0NeyaGtNKQ8_d7hu71FQanpZQ8MLBT9SVZSNBY6GEmQZrbai5aqDHeWtc062SpwghiKM8Vl6vNnU_2Wr3PGw-mJohS8izBz9RBMT71KFq_N6Hh6R3brLbo4Hmpy141MBEOLrx0AS_Eb95cOWytutuZ)
---
Attorney General Patrick Morrisey joined his counterparts in 21 states in calling for the Biden Administration to declare Mexican drug cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations (FTO). “This administration needs to call these organizations what they really are: terrorists,” Attorney General Morrisey said. “The Mexican drug cartels are using fear, intimidation and violence to further their foothold in the illicit drug trade.”
---
[Read the Full Letter](http://links.teammorrisey.com/u/click?_t=b0356ef447a34444a1b227ba5b6fa8b2&_m=6e8bce109747433d87f7518e72aa2ae2&_e=Cl_s9xHY-xBGINkKnXYwHtkV3Z79BTYc8V-UKYxOoZSPzn6UG4Jr83Dh9LA3RQDOluNQrfpweyIuICwtjZ6_BC80kdP2YR-g12bQ_E-Xo1_6pE8ECBL1dlmiHLz9ZlKNhZ7nPtDO8QgkTiUJ9ed-5H7RSs5UKzouUJ4mjG3hUE_FoKHgUX8sWH7UvGW8tEQaS9LLXErCZKHQeCAaRvN_GOsm8oo102kl0QKKeo5xS7qPE0uk0-0V87m5H30RauYNFvZQSWR5MefTvuyE-_V-hOAOOO7w7J3NQ7ugE9xsww6hx1p_zwYRek9i5ZJledNk)

clean_body: | | | | | | | West Virginia Misses President Trump: An Opinion Piece by Attorney General Morrisey Earlier this month, West Virginia Attorney General Patrick Morrisey wrote an article calling for an apology from President Biden. In his piece the Attorney General touches on how West Virginia sorely misses President Trump as he paved a path for our country toward global resilience and local revitalization. | | Attorney General Patrick Morrisey suing over ATF pistol brace rule As a proud defender of our Second Amendment rights, AG Morrisey is rallying other attorneys general and leading the charge in a lawsuit against the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF), following the implementation of a new rule regulating pistol braces. Morrisey Discusses Plans for 2024 Election Cycle The Attorney General joined Hoppy Kercheval in an interview to discuss his plans for the upcoming 2024 election cycle. While the Attorney General isn’t fully prepared to make a campaign announcement, he does mention that there are options on the table for the next steps in his political career, and that an announcement will be made in the coming months. | | Attorney General Morrisey Calls for Biden to Designate Mexican Drug Cartels as Terrorist Organizations Attorney General Patrick Morrisey joined his counterparts in 21 states in calling for the Biden Administration to declare Mexican drug cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations (FTO). “This administration needs to call these organizations what they really are: terrorists,” Attorney General Morrisey said. “The Mexican drug cartels are using fear, intimidation and violence to further their foothold in the illicit drug trade.” | | Team Morrisey Storefront | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM MORRISEY a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Ohio’s cruel abortion ban means that even a 10-year-old victim of abuse would have to travel out of state to get an abortion. It’s sick, and that’s why a coalition of grassroots activists and women’s rights advocates have put up a ballot initiative to overturn the ban. Will you help?
body:
Abortion on the ballot in Ohio
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b6b28d4-ece5-4909-870b-aeff71c28766/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **A little 10-year-old girl. She should be going to school, playing with friends, enjoying life. Yet, first she's victimized by sexual assault, then Ohio victimizes her again, telling her she must birth the child of her violent attacker at the age of 10, or leave the state to have an abortion. This is sick.** **_Many of you are familiar with this story as it was nationally reported. You may not be familiar with the fact that 2 other pregnant minors raped in Ohio were confronted with the choice of torturing their young bodies and souls by giving birth to a child--as a child--or risk the emotional trauma of becoming a subject of FoxNews smears as they tried to secretly leave Ohio to end an unwanted pregnancy thrust upon them via violent attack._** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8ff4e72-f92c-4050-90ce-5313a0ddaa83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**_Will you join us in ending the Handmaid's Tale in Ohio, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf1038677-1eea-4073-b49e-b5fb519eb4e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98042c3b-fb64-4de1-999d-a2f5c34048b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Ohio is fighting to put an amendment on the ballot in November, so there's no more horror stories like this, no more Christian Al Qaeda taking over womens' and young girls' bodies, ordering them to submit their souls to patriarchal autocracy._ **_THIS. ENDS. HERE. THIS. ENDS. NOW._** [**_Will you join us in ending the Handmaid's Tale in Ohio, stopping 9, 10, 11 year old girls from being tortured by chuckling, ghoulish, Republican men, supposed state legislators, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to help Ohioans for Reproductive Freedom pass this amendment!!_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03ebde26-e801-46e3-97a3-e73c333faf52/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_We'll never ask you for anything more important than this, than the lives of our young daughters._** Thank you, Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c02d537-5610-4108-94ce-9f1735fb0b79/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

| | |

| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/ohioansforreproductivefreedom3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T44396368-0b53-4cc3-8017-70c01d43f7b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=3d7bd2b6-3b91-4bbb-bb6a-c58a5dbf548d&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=3d7bd2b6-3b91-4bbb-bb6a-c58a5dbf548d&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET)** Are you tired of hearing that being American is something to be ashamed of? This past week, a Fairfax County [school board member suggested](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=a95e465de0d24e448330f236adc64386&_e=lNdvJIIr2U3yGjKryCg5n_ho0HRz5i3N8ULk0QQUsTbZX4zlMD0Ayuz-VobThfvEP6upf3gYGI2SqvYEYRPotyUWlMqdNUfb_OgLpNVHZKBDRpF1xW70Kxk53iHn_h4Zc-5Yq3B1dmHG23GEQQA1K_BKTS-MW6NHeWt1f4ghQniR1Mz47HBf9fDYZZYWkvUAQpipMf0hu6dzSZi3n7tWRbIssqj0xwYdvsw-6yuhks5xYv52QEwnw3-FopCtRX9odKStipU1pfh5Wi9PDcax6aDPnzGS0wTcDsJxgg4NVbS2IuVQst5P8HTg6lzlPSgYwCiaQnG1bB4y80v2J-2PYGmdpoZSAYnbikjhnPXBEro%3D) that the U.S. victory in the battle of Iwo Jima was “evil.” Democrats continue to show their true colors with comments like these. Do you want to see leaders who embody the resilience and ingenuity of our great country? Unleash America PAC is dedicated to supporting leaders and policies in Virginia and across the United States. America's best days are ahead, and I’m committed to creating a future where all Americans can reach their full potential and thrive. If you haven’t already, join me in our mission to ensure the United States remains a beacon of hope for future generations. Get involved today! \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of [Unleash America PAC](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=a95e465de0d24e448330f236adc64386&_e=lNdvJIIr2U3yGjKryCg5n5H43jJhTF0bVQFnh7vaerMEu22Z1zmjsRSnI0nw2XJ9ph8eF-Ef32slJl2WpjhDF2zJzSPnpPG5DwVK2pnkteRqCGOnEUf5_bqzStQIToGzRRsuUZWvGNg4sh7vl9gRmSNnWf_x9aibXPzmz8_mCElAE5L5gOdVbSLhTV9oUaamMb6cFHT1EBpCDE7zPRV7M8w_pLUHNngd-9jGbyadksi-FBHzWHvmgKlmHYEZhN6XU5NI476cv6OlmlO8rfiDDR7HMWjSzwnJqT1XbBEAQdE%3D)

Months later, I watched in horror as 13 Marines, soldiers, and one sailor died. It was equally agonizing to watch as desperate Afghans, once loyal allies were abandoned by President Joe Biden and left to fend for themselves by the Taliban. This week, I shared my thoughts with the Daily Mail on a new report detailing who is to blame for the botched withdrawal from Afghanistan. President Biden and his team bear no responsibility for their actions in Afghanistan, whether about the withdrawal or the drone strike that killed an aid worker and innocent children.

clean_body: | | | | | March 5, 2023 | WEEKLY NEWSLETTER | Issue 3 | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) Are you tired of hearing that being American is something to be ashamed of? This past week, a Fairfax County that the U.S. victory in the battle of Iwo Jima was “evil.” Democrats continue to show their true colors with comments like these. Do you want to see leaders who embody the resilience and ingenuity of our great country? Unleash America PAC is dedicated to supporting leaders and policies in Virginia and across the United States. America's best days are ahead, and I’m committed to creating a future where all Americans can reach their full potential and thrive. If you haven’t already, join me in our mission to ensure the United States remains a beacon of hope for future generations. Get involved today! \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET), Honorary Chairman of | The U.S. Blunders that Caused the Rapid Collapse of Afghanistan My final deployment as a member of the United States Navy ended in January 2021 in Afghanistan. Months later, I watched in horror as 13 Marines, soldiers, and one sailor died. It was equally agonizing to watch as desperate Afghans, once loyal allies were abandoned by President Joe Biden and left to fend for themselves by the Taliban. This week, I shared my thoughts with the Daily Mail on a new report detailing who is to blame for the botched withdrawal from Afghanistan. President Biden and his team bear no responsibility for their actions in Afghanistan, whether about the withdrawal or the drone strike that killed an aid worker and innocent children. | VA Democrats Continue to Act as a Roadblock to Meaningful Legislation By these Democrats' logic, if teaching communism creates Asian hate, then what does teaching about slavery create? Teaching the truth is never comfortable, but ensuring future generations don't repeat past mistakes is critical. I know firsthand that communism is not something to take lightly, and we cannot let it become just another form of government that we adopt in the name of equity. | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Hung remember to use #UnleashAmerica! | | | | | | That's it for this week, thank you for reading.
